programme.desc: Depressed, Martin leaves Detroit to find himself but doesn't tell Gina where he is going.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Grumpy Young Men
programme.desc: Will and Carlton get into a fight over a girl, but in the end their friendship prevails.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Fresh Prince, the Movie
programme.desc: When Will witnesses a murder, he and his family are put in the witness protection program.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Will's Misery
programme.desc: Will gets caught up in a sorority prank that is meant to teach him to respect women.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Father Knows Best
programme.desc: Ashley realizes that there is more to life than the controlled environment she lives in.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Love Hurts
programme.desc: Will's ego takes a beating when Lisa has to beat up a guy for him.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Will's Up the Dirt Road
programme.desc: Will gets sued while trying to impress Lisa by taking pictures of celebrity homes.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Will Steps Out
programme.desc: Will decides to fight fire-with-fire when he suspects that Lisa is dating another guy.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Same Game, Next Season
programme.desc: Lisa's father is so impressed with Will that he intrudes on their budding relationship.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Three's a Crowd
programme.desc: Will and Carlton's friendship is strained by Will's on-going relationship with Lisa.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: It's a Wonderful Lie
programme.desc: Will, Lisa and Ashley get caught in lies and realize that telling the truth is easier.

programme.title: Movie: Barbershop: The Next Cut
programme.desc: Things are going well for Calvin, Eddie and the rest of the crew at Calvin's Barbershop, but their neighbourhood is taking a turn for the worse. With gang members roaming the streets, the crew needs to work together to save the shop and the community.

programme.title: Movie: Hitch
programme.desc: While helping his latest client, a professional 'date doctor' falls for a journalist.

programme.title: Movie: Nature of Love
programme.desc: A city girl is writing a magazine feature on a glamping resort where she faces her fears and tries out the camp's activities with the help of a handsome outdoorsman.

programme.title: Movie: Flip That Romance
programme.desc: Rival house-flippers find themselves in a renovation face-off when they are both assigned two halves of a duplex to renovate. They attempt to out-renovate each other, every-step of the way, which leads to an unexpected romance.

programme.title: Movie: A Taste of Summer
programme.desc: A woman makes a risky move and opens her own restaurant, igniting her passion for cooking. Upon her arrival, she meets a former baseball player, with a competitive streak, who has opened his own new restaurant and sparks fly.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Break-In
programme.desc: Terrified by a burglary, the girls explore means to protect themselves, including a dog.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Blanche and the Younger Man
programme.desc: Blanche dates her young aerobics instructor; Rose is overprotective of her mother.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Heart Attack
programme.desc: Sophia suffers an apparent heart attack and the girls nervously await the paramedics.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Stan's Return
programme.desc: Dorothy's ex-husband, Stan shows up to settle a piece of land they bought on their honeymoon. This leads to Dorothy and Stan spending the night together. Meanwhile, Rose and Blanche plan a vacation that Sophia is not invited on.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Custody Battle
programme.desc: Dorothy's sister, Gloria, comes to Miami for a visit and asks Sophia to come live with her in California. Meanwhile, Blanche is furious when Rose is cast as Lady Macbeth in a local play, and not her.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: A Little Romance
programme.desc: Rose has been dating Dr. Jonathan Newman and begins to think their relationship is leading to the altar. However she begins to have second thoughts especially since he's a midget.

programme.title: Frasier: To Kill a Talking Bird
programme.desc: Niles' new apartment building doesn't allow cats or dogs, so Niles get a new cockatoo. However, his decision to throw a party to meet his new neighbours is ruined when the bird attaches itself to Niles' head.

programme.title: Frasier: Roz's Krantz and Gouldenstein Are Dead
programme.desc: Roz develops a reputation as the 'angel of death' after everyone she takes care of at a retirement home dies on her. Meanwhile, Frasier ponders what effect his talk show has on people.

programme.title: Frasier: The Unnatural
programme.desc: Upon learning that the radio station's softball team is short one player, Frasier's son, Frederick, insists his dad should fill in. Not wanting to let his son down, Frasier asks Martin to help him learn how to play.

programme.title: Frasier: Roz's Turn
programme.desc: When Roz decides to audition for her own radio show, Frasier mistakenly tells his agent, Bebe, that he would be sad to see Roz go. Frasier is outraged when Bebe tells the station manager that Frasier would quit if Roz got her own show.

programme.title: Frasier: Ham Radio
programme.desc: Frasier volunteers to recreate the radio station's first ever mystery play, but disaster looms when his only professional actor quits. Family and friends help Frasier as he struggles to perform each role.

programme.title: Frasier: Three Dates and a Breakup
programme.desc: Niles attends a benefit with Frasier in the hopes of meeting an eligible woman, but it is Frasier who ends up with all the attention. While Frasier juggles three dates in three days, he also has to mend his father's strained relationship with Sherry.

programme.title: Frasier: Three Dates and a Breakup
programme.desc: Niles attends a benefit with Frasier in the hopes of meeting an eligible woman, but it is Frasier who ends up with all the attention. While Frasier juggles three dates in three days, he also has to mend his father's strained relationship with Sherry.

programme.title: Frasier: Daphne Hates Sherry
programme.desc: Daphne and Sherry clash over their relationship with Martin, so Daphne stays at Niles's.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: In Palm Springs
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel take off on a mateless California vacation where they see a movie star.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Dancing Star
programme.desc: A friend of Lucy's is visiting from NY and wants to meet some stars Lucy has befriended.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Harpo Marx
programme.desc: Lucy decides to impersonate some Hollywood notables to impress a near-sighted girlfriend.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Ricky Needs An Agent
programme.desc: Lucy decides that Ricky needs an agent to negotiate more money and cut down his workload.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: That Was No Lady
programme.desc: Dorothy latest boyfriend, Glen, gives her a shock when he tells her he's married. She surprises herself when she finds herself sneaking around to be with him. Meanwhile, Blanche unloads her old car on Rose in order to buy a new one.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: In a Bed of Rose's
programme.desc: Late one evening, Rose brings a man home and they spend the night together. However, in the morning she finds that he has passed away. Even worse, she later discovers he was married.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Truth Will Out
programme.desc: Rose is apprehensive about a visit from her daughter and granddaughter, since their reason for coming is to settle Rose's late-husband's will. Meanwhile, Blanche gets caught up in the tabloids of a society murder.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Nice and Easy
programme.desc: Blanche's visiting niece is a chip right off the old block when she dates a different man all night every night. Dorothy does battle with a mouse living in the house.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Operation
programme.desc: Dorothy is hesitant about having foot surgery just as she was scheduled to tap dance with Blanche and Rose at a dance recital.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Second Motherhood
programme.desc: Blanche is romanced by a wealthy suitor who she learns has several small children. This fact dampens his proposal of marriage. Meanwhile, Dorothy and Rose go to bat with the bathroom plumbing.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Actress Becca Tobin and actor Matt Barr visit. Then, The Butter End Cakery owner, Kimberly Bailey whips up a red, white, and blue cake.

programme.title: Movie: Summer in the Vineyard
programme.desc: A couple are gearing up for 'Summer Fest,' their town's largest event where they will be unveiling their new wine. To everyone's shock, his brother announces his return to town, where he purchases the history B&B.

programme.title: Movie: A Novel Romance
programme.desc: A best-selling novelist writing under a pen name moves to Portland and unknowingly falls in love with the biggest critic of his latest book. When true identities are revealed, both must take a leap of faith.

programme.title: Movie: Ms. Matched
programme.desc: A successful wedding planner is paired with a financial advisor at a wedding expo and soon realizes she is giving the exact opposite advice to their audience. When they are forced to spend time together, they find out they have a lot in common.

programme.title: The Office: Get the Girl
programme.desc: Andy makes a life-altering decision and drives across the country to pursue Erin. Meanwhile, Nellie shows up in Scranton and tries to claim the manager position.

programme.title: The Office: Welcome Party
programme.desc: When Robert makes the office throw a welcome party for Nellie, the party planners try to sabotage it. Meanwhile, Andy and Erin practice how Andy will break up with Jessica.

programme.title: The Office: Angry Andy
programme.desc: Andy returns from his romantic quest to find his manhood in jeopardy. As he and Nellie duke it out over the manager's chair, his co-workers offer advice on how to perform.

programme.title: The Office: Fundraiser
programme.desc: An unemployed Andy crashes a fundraiser for the Senator and winds up adopting 12 disabled dogs.

programme.title: The Office: Turf War
programme.desc: When Robert drunkenly shuts down a nearby branch, Jim and Dwight join forces to outsmart a salesman from Scranton's uglier sister city.

programme.title: The Office: Free Family Portrait Studio
programme.desc: A stolen diaper leads to a high-speed car chase. With help from an old boss, Andy goes undercover as a janitor and stages a takeover.

programme.title: The Office: New Guys
programme.desc: Jim and Dwight are thrown off balance by the arrival of two young employees. Andy comes back from leadership training with a desire for vengeance against Nellie.

programme.title: The Office: Roy's Wedding
programme.desc: The wedding toast of Pam's ex fiancé Roy causes Pam and Jim to examine their relationship for buried secrets.

programme.title: The Office: Andy's Ancestry
programme.desc: Andy learns he is related to Michelle Obama and flaunts his bloodlines.

programme.title: The Office: Work Bus
programme.desc: When Jim convinces Dwight that the building is unsafe, Dwight rents a bus and sets up the office inside. Nellie asks for Andy's help in adopting a baby and Jim tries to make Pam happy with some pie.

programme.title: The Office: Here Comes Treble
programme.desc: It's Halloween at the office and Andy invites his college a capella group to perform. Dwight searches for evidence of a madman loose in the office.

programme.title: The Office: The Boat
programme.desc: Andy must man up when his Dad blows all the family money. When Dwight is interviewed on local radio, Jim and the office torture him with bizarre call ins.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: June 25, 2020
programme.desc: As the coronavirus keeps millions confined to their homes, Trevor reports on the pandemic from the comfort of his couch, and The World's Fakest News Team weighs in on the crisis from a safe social distance.

programme.title: The Office: The Whale
programme.desc: Dwight finds himself needing to be able to sell to women so Pam and the ladies help him out.

programme.title: South Park: Gnomes
programme.desc: Cartman, Stan, Kyle and Kenny are assigned to write a report with Tweek, the very nervous and highly caffeinated boy who insists gnomes are stealing his underpants.

programme.title: South Park: Towelie
programme.desc: When the government steals their new Gamesphere, the boys will stop at nothing to get it back. There is also a new dysfunctional character in South Park who tries to recruit the boys to his cause.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: June 25, 2020
programme.desc: As the coronavirus keeps millions confined to their homes, Trevor reports on the pandemic from the comfort of his couch, and The World's Fakest News Team weighs in on the crisis from a safe social distance.

programme.title: South Park: Death
programme.desc: Grandpa's sole birthday wish is for Stan to take part in his assisted suicide. Meanwhile, Mrs. Broflovski has organized a protest against the boys' favourite TV show, 'Terrance and Phillip.'

programme.title: South Park: Ike's Wee Wee
programme.desc: Mr. Mackey, the school counsellor, is fired and turns to drugs and alcohol. Meanwhile, when the boys find out what it means to be circumcised they try to save Ike from his Bris.

programme.title: South Park: How to Eat With Your Butt
programme.desc: Cartman gets Kenny's school picture on every 'missing child' milk carton in the country. Cartman then sees the funniest thing ever and breaks his funny bone, losing his sense of humour.

programme.title: South Park: The Return of the Fellowship of the Ring to the Two Towers
programme.desc: The boys embark upon a mythical quest as they set out to return their copy of the 'The Lord of the Rings' movie to the Two Towers video store. Unknown to them, they are really carrying the most degraded porno ever made.

programme.title: South Park: Worldwide Recorder Concert
programme.desc: The children of South Park are invited to Arkansas for the 'Four Million Child Blow 2000,' the first worldwide recorder concert. When Cartman discovers the 'brown noise,' he changes the music for the concert, causing a very smelly mess.

programme.title: South Park: Miss Teacher Bangs a Boy
programme.desc: An elementary school teacher in South Park is conducting an illicit affair with a student while Cartman becomes the new school hallway monitor. When a student in his jurisdiction commits an infraction, Cartman takes it a little too personally.

programme.title: Military Makeover: Harvey-Woodruff Family
programme.desc: It's the day the Military Makeover team has been working towards-- reveal day!

programme.title: The King of Queens: Where's Poppa?
programme.desc: Doug ends up in Dr. Becker's waiting room after being hit by a foul ball at a Mets game.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Train Wreck

programme.title: The King of Queens: Hungry Man
programme.desc: Doug embarrasses Carrie when he arrives unprepared at her boss's elegant cocktail party.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Time Share
programme.desc: The neighbours are separating and have a time-share for sale in the Hamptons.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Art House
programme.desc: Doug's patience with Arthur's eccentricities fades after he almost gets Doug fired.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Maybe Baby
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie contemplate having a baby; Doug talks to Arthur about fatherhood.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Queasy Rider
programme.desc: Doug feels the road calling and, against Carrie's advice, buys himself a motorcycle.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Female Problems
programme.desc: Carrie feels friendless so Doug suggests she befriend a young woman down the street.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Assaulted Nuts
programme.desc: Doug accidentally staples his underwear to his body while goofing around with the guys.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Parent Trapped
programme.desc: Carrie and Doug have mixed reactions when Deacon and Kelly ask them to be godparents.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Tube Stakes
programme.desc: Doug is horrified to wake up one morning to discover his beloved big-screen TV is missing.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Doug Out
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie take Arthur to a Mets game and get arrested for catching a game ball.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Get Away
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie go away for a romantic weekend with Deacon and Kelly.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Dire Straits
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie's dinner with Ray and Debra goes awry when the guys watch the game.

programme.title: The King of Queens: I, Candy
programme.desc: Doug is giddy with excitement when the hot waitress at his local hangout flirts with him.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Roamin' Holiday
programme.desc: Doug invites Spence to move in for Thanksgiving weekend so he can avoid an annoying guest.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Sparing Carrie
programme.desc: Doug's bowling team must either win a match or get rid of the poor bowler on the team.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Net Prophets
programme.desc: When Carrie receives her Christmas bonus, Doug wants to invest it in his IPS pension fund.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Legionnaires' Disease
programme.desc: History was made in Philadelphia in the summer of 1976 -- not because of the bicentennial, but because of the mysterious death of 34 Legionnaires.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Wilson Murder
programme.desc: An eye doctor is found beaten to death, by his wife. When police arrest an itinerant painter for the murder, he accuses the wife and her sister of hiring him to kill the doctor. Investigators must use forensic science to work out just what happen.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unmasked
programme.desc: A serial rapist was on the loose in a Texas town. No one knew where he'd strike next, but the audacity of his attacks and the escalation of violence against his victims made finding him imperative.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fashion Police
programme.desc: A victim had been stabbed more than thirty times, and the only evidence investigators had was a distinctive button found at the scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Church Dis-Service
programme.desc: A young woman attends evening church services... then disappears. Eyewitnesses place her at a nearby gas station, getting into a van. Three days later when her body is discovered, the search for the driver of that van intensifies.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seedy Intentions
programme.desc: When a nine-year-old girl goes missing, police and volunteers spend weeks searching for her. A psychic’s vision leads to a field where her body is discovered, along with what investigators hope is enough evidence to help them to also find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Expert Witness
programme.desc: A woman's tragedy may help bring closure to a 13-year-old case where a young mother was brutally sexually assaulted and killed in her own apartment.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hack Attack
programme.desc: A successful and growing manufacturing company is suddenly hit with a massive computer crash, jeopardizing the future of the company.

programme.title: Very Scary People: NorCal Rapist: Phantom Predator
programme.desc: Wanted for multiple sex attacks against women in Northern California over three decades, this masked predator meticulously planned his assaults by studying the habits and routines of his female prey. After 27 years investigators finally close in.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All That Glitters Is Gold
programme.desc: A bullet-riddled car, a missing driver and no witnesses poses a mystery, until a tiny and unique clue is found.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shadow of a Doubt
programme.desc: An unknown assailant walked into a retail store and fired three shots, killing the owner. Police had suspects, but all of them had alibis.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Web of Seduction
programme.desc: When the scene of a murder proves to be completely bare of evidence, computer forensics experts manage to dig up files on the victim's computer, and those of his wife and her lover that finger a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cloak of Deceit
programme.desc: Forensic scientists study video surveillance of a trio of men who have been robbing banks for 7 years. They are eventually caught because of the forensic team's expert skill.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Photo Finish
programme.desc: A beautiful model goes missing and no one has a clue to her whereabouts until a park employee discovers photographs in a trash dumpster. With the photos are some vital pieces of information which eventually lead to a professional photographer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: One for the Road
programme.desc: After a married couple decided to escape the cold of winter with a vacation in Key West, the wife went missing and police searched the island without finding any evidence. Then two important pieces of video surfaced.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Death by a Salesman
programme.desc: Even though there were no witnesses, police manage to track down murderer less than 12 hours after the fact. Using fingerprints at the scene and security camera footage, officers arrested the perpetrator even though he was out of the state, on a bus.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Bitter Pill to Swallow
programme.desc: A pregnant woman experiences severe morning sickness and suspects something is amiss.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fishing for the Truth
programme.desc: A rescued deckhand tells the story of how he tried desperately to free his captain when his foot got caught as their small boat was sinking in a storm. He's quickly hailed a hero. But when the captain's body is found, a different story is told.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Separation Anxiety
programme.desc: 'The Tracey Frame Case' - after a passer-by spots a wild fire in a secluded parking lot, police discover a dreadful homicide. It takes days to identify the victim, and most of the evidence is lost when firefighters extinguish the blaze.

programme.title: Very Scary People: NorCal Rapist: Phantom Predator
programme.desc: Wanted for multiple sex attacks against women in Northern California over three decades, this masked predator meticulously planned his assaults by studying the habits and routines of his female prey. After 27 years investigators finally close in.

programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: Something's Killing Me: Deadly Bite
programme.desc: High school volleyball player Jeanna Giese complains that she’s fatigued and has numbness in her arm.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Family Tree
programme.desc: After the brutal slaying of a young couple on a road trip, the victims’ families begin receiving disturbing letters.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Letter
programme.desc: The sudden and mysterious death of a health conscious woman triggers an investigation into what killed her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trouble Brewing
programme.desc: A high-priced call girl is murdered on the outskirts of Columbia, SC, and find that a six-pack of beer may be their only link to the person responsible.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Holy Terror
programme.desc: When churches are bombed in a community in Illinois, the people responsible are quickly apprehended. But the bombings somehow continue, leading to this explosive investigation to be reopened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writing on the Wall
programme.desc: A gorgeous flight attendant is brutally murdered in her own home and the laundry list of suspects is growing by the minute. A striking clue at the scene leads investigators in the wrong direction, but will forensic evidence get them back on track?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hundreds of Reasons
programme.desc: A well-liked assistant manager of a Florida steakhouse in murdered while he closes his restaurant for the night.

programme.title: Forensic Files: See No Evil
programme.desc: Police uncover a string of murdered prostitutes, each of which have had their eyes carved out.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Easier Said Than Done
programme.desc: After a nation-wide search, two lucky fans were selected to take on a special 14-day survival challenge. A nurturing mother and an independent adventurer try to survive in the rainforests of Nicaragua.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Beware the Bayou
programme.desc: Billy Berger and Ky Furneaux are dropped in it up to their necks as they have to survive 21 days in the Louisiana swamp. They are washed out of their shelter by storms, must battle deadly snakes and avoid hungry alligators.

programme.title: Treasure Island With Bear Grylls: Water Works
programme.desc: The islanders struggle with sleep deprivation and an insect infestation. Jack manages to wrestle a half-eaten iguana from a python, providing a much-needed meal. Desperation sets in as the group realizes their water source is running dry.

programme.title: Treasure Island With Bear Grylls: Hide and Seek
programme.desc: The islanders relocate on the island to secure a water source. Ravenous hunger soon sets in, and Jack leads some into the jungle to hunt for food. Meanwhile, some of the hidden cash has been found and stashed unbeknownst to some in the group.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Second Chances
programme.desc: A survivalist tries to redeem herself by tackling the harsh jungles of Guyana, but tensions rise with her partner as starvation sets in. On Namibia's harsh savanna, a challenge is complicated by the arrival of a competitor looking for a second chance.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: Boiling Point
programme.desc: Makani desperately pushes through the broiling valley to find a new tribe. Ryan hatches a high-risk plan to get a kill. Suzanne plots her exit from Seth, but Africa's heat thwarts her plan and forces a survivalist to leave the challenge.

programme.title: Treasure Island With Bear Grylls: Hide and Seek
programme.desc: The islanders relocate on the island to secure a water source. Ravenous hunger soon sets in, and Jack leads some into the jungle to hunt for food. Meanwhile, some of the hidden cash has been found and stashed unbeknownst to some in the group.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Touch of Poison
programme.desc: Deadly stingrays and aggressive anacondas torment survivalists as they try to survive 21 days in sun-scorched Brazil.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: Boiling Point
programme.desc: Makani desperately pushes through the broiling valley to find a new tribe. Ryan hatches a high-risk plan to get a kill. Suzanne plots her exit from Seth, but Africa's heat thwarts her plan and forces a survivalist to leave the challenge.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Whiskey Business: Southern Inheritance
programme.desc: The Williams family made Carolina whiskey for generations until prohibition shut it down. When moonshine legend Tim Smith brings backwoods knowledge to recreate the family recipe, he discovers one of the most important distilleries in American history.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Whiskey Business: Underwater Gin Joint
programme.desc: Rescuing the worst distillery he's ever seen, Tim applies his backwoods know-how to re-engineer the still, taking the owner's gin to the next level.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for the Chupacabra
programme.desc: In the dark caves and thick jungles of Puerto Rico, Josh Gates tracks a possible Chupacabra.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Legend of Jesse James
programme.desc: Josh journeys across the American Midwest in search of the legendary golden loot of Jesse James. Along the way, Josh debunks Jesse James myths, rappels off a cliff on Wichita Mt. and follows treasure hunters into Buzzards Roost.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Butch Cassidy's Lost Loot
programme.desc: Josh immerses himself in Wild West lore on a quest to find Butch Cassidy's missing money. He traces the iconic outlaw's footsteps through Colorado, Utah and Nevada, eventually learning that he may need to find the man himself to locate the lost loot.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Josh Gates Tonight: Wild Wild Josh
programme.desc: Saddle up and head out west with Josh Gates as he explores the legends of the Wild West with special guests and exclusive footage all from the comfort of his spare bedroom.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Vanished Empire
programme.desc: On the Mediterranean island of Crete, the Minoans built one of the most glorious civilizations in the ancient world and then mysteriously vanished. Josh Gates travels to Greece to find out exactly how Europe's first superpower disappeared.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for the Metal Library
programme.desc: Josh travels through the jungles of Ecuador to explore the watery depths of Tayos Cave for a legendary set of metal plates believed to be created by an advanced ancient civilization.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Cloning the Woolly Mammoth
programme.desc: To help clone the extinct woolly mammoth back to life, Josh Gates visits the Korean biotech lab driving the project and excavates ancient bones in a working Canadian gold mine. He then descends into a vast sinkhole in Siberia to unearth frozen DNA.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Journey to the Ice Age
programme.desc: To find a viable sample of mammoth DNA, Josh Gates retrieves bone samples from the massive Batagay Crater. He then journeys far upriver to a site in the lawless Siberian wilderness where tusk hunters carve out troves of bones from the permafrost.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Japan's Atlantis
programme.desc: Josh heads to Japan to explore the sunken ruins called Japan's Atlantis.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Kalahari Desert's Lost City
programme.desc: Josh traverses Africa's Kalahari Desert, looking for a fabled lost city.

programme.title: Dino Hunters: Dinosaur Cowboys
programme.desc: On the series premiere of Dino Hunters, dinosaur fossil season has begun and Montana rancher Clayton Phipps finds what might be an extremely rare and valuable fossil on his family's property. In Wyoming, Mike Harris and his son uncover a triceratops horn.

programme.desc: Valerie risks eviction when her neighbour reports her to the health department. Ann's house is so filled with clutter that she only has three square feet in her living room.

programme.title: Storage Wars: LBC U LTR
programme.desc: Ivy is racing against time to score a locker and get home; otherwise, he'll be in the doghouse. Rene spends the most money of anyone, but it's Darrell and Brandon who paint their way to success.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Deep in the Heart of Upland
programme.desc: The buyers have a surprise visitor from the Lone Star state at an auction in Upland, CA. Jarrod and Brandi are determined to make big money from small finds.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Talking in Cody
programme.desc: In Moreno Valley, Emily brings along her cowboy husband. Ivy is displeased at Mary’s fraternization with the auctioneer, and takes it out on her later.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Gambler of Thrones
programme.desc: The buyers head out to Palm Springs for an auction that brings sweet lockers and big money finds. Mary is worried that they area may be too high society for her, while Ivy sets his sights on vintage items.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Barry Doubtfire
programme.desc: The buyers take over Stanton, CA. Darrell gets himself banned from one of the auctions. Barry goes to the auction undercover.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Pay the Dan
programme.desc: Ivy is revved up and looking for high-end lockers, Rene and Casey are at odds over what to buy, and things get a little hairy for Jarrod and Brandi.

programme.title: Storage Wars: No Bid for the Weary
programme.desc: The buyers coast into Costa Mesa, Calif., where Dave Hester finds something that's worth cheering over, and Darrell Sheets buys his biggest locker in Storage Wars history.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Zen Masters of the Universe
programme.desc: Rene is being groomed to take over the competition, while Ivy learns a lesson that changes his tune about locker buying.

programme.title: Storage Wars: There Will Be Blood Money
programme.desc: Brandi does her best to stay positive for Jarrod, while Dave is out for blood.

programme.title: Storage Wars: My Little Brony
programme.desc: The buyers head south to Oceanside, CA, which is Rene's backyard and he intends to make the competition pay for coming to his territory. Jarrod and Brandi discover that friendship can be magic and profitable.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Some Mo' Mr. Nice Guy
programme.desc: It's back to Moreno Valley, where Justin's congeniality earns him Rene's goodwill and a chance to level up; Darrell's tubular locker tests out OK.

programme.title: Storage Wars: High Stakes and Low Blows
programme.desc: The buyers return to Montebello, home to some of the biggest finds and worst dramas. Ivy has never hit it big here so he is focused on a good score no matter the cost. Meanwhile, Jarrod and Brandi are determined to not let another big locker get away.

programme.title: Storage Wars: War on the Shore
programme.desc: Barry Weiss finds a wondrous twelve-inch piano, which could be more than just a child's toy.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Santa Ana Street Fight
programme.desc: In Santa Ana, California, trashy looking units hold a gold mine of goods. From kayaks to golf clubs, the buyers flock to this tough town and break the bank.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Whiskers and Lies
programme.desc: In Hawaiian Gardens, Darrell breaks in the new guy. Brandi and Jarrod detect something mysterious in their unit; Justin paws his way through a decent locker.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Just Deserts
programme.desc: Ivy uses a dastardly tactic to rouse the competition as the auction forces Mary to travel well out of her comfort zone. Rene steps up his game, while Darrell tries to score despite Brandon's sour mood.

programme.title: Storage Wars: The Full Monty-Bello
programme.desc: Dave Hester heads straight to the bank, and Jarrod and Brandi leave the auction wishing they never came.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Grin and Barry It
programme.desc: Darrell pays a visit to Ivy's backyard to remind him who the king of storage buying really is. Meanwhile, Jarrod and Brandi feel surrounded by a bunch of pigs.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Grandma's Havoc
programme.desc: In Victorville, Ivy takes it easy, letting Ivy Jr. run the operation. Kenny feels run down and his lack of focus lands him a locker, though there's a pleasant surprise in the end. Mary, Shana and Edwina just can’t seem to make anything stick.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Crate Balls of Fire
programme.desc: In Santa Ana, the buyers bid on 10 vaults belonging to the same owner. Dave snaps up almost half of them, while Ivy draws a nice profit out of his. But in the end, Mary and Kenny end up doing all the heavy lifting.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Good, the Bad and the Uncomfortable
programme.desc: The guys talk ticks, tricks and antics. Plus, see the Jokers’ best bloopers and learn all about their annoying habits that aren’t captured on camera.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Baggage Shame
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q and Joe share secrets with shoppers in a grocery store, but when one shopper has a history with Murr, the embarrassment escalates to a whole new level. Then, the guys get creative in an art store.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Lost Boy
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Sal and Q network their way into some very uncomfortable business conversations, and go head to head in a photography presentation that's anything but picture perfect.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: In Poor Taste Buds
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr take to the court to serve up some seriously personal tennis lessons and then head to the park for a bewildering game of Now! The loser must put his face through the ultimate test during a food presentation.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Dream Crusher
programme.desc: The guys try to kiss unsuspecting strangers until a special guest crashes the party, they focus-group their absurd life stories as potential movies, and the big loser gets a room-full of enemies while judging a kids' talent show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pseudo-Sumo
programme.desc: The guys freeze out skaters at an ice rink's rental counter, and head to the mall where they have the audacity to ask strangers to mind their manners. Then, tonight's loser is down for the count after donning a diaper for a sumo-sized punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Takes the Cake
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr try to warm up to strangers at a ski lodge and pull up a chair as uninvited guests at an Italian restaurant. And tonight’s punishment takes the cake when the loser is the surprise entertainer at the wrong party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Wrapper's Delight
programme.desc: The guys make a mockery of each other while acting as restaurant managers, sing along with strangers trying to name that (made up) tune. The loser gets wrapped up in a birthday surprise that definitely wasn't on his wish list.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Three Men and Your Baby
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr, and Q get snap happy posing as photographers, and all but one of the guys are faced with a punishment that's not child's play.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Off the Reservation
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Joe and Sal participate in a fake documentary, then find themselves in the middle of a marshmallow throwing contest. Plus, tonight's big loser is the host with the least when he can't find customers' dinner reservations.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 5
programme.desc: The guys dine and discuss their week. Find out who can make the best meal and how long Q's beard has become.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: X Man
programme.desc: The guys compete in their first four-way challenge. Later, see what happens when they try to lead a kid's art class, and which loser fails so badly that he's hit with an on-the-spot punishment that leaves him seeing red.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Medium, Well Done
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q, and Joe pose as TV execs pitching insane shows, and tonight's big loser undergoes a psychic reading that puts his real life on the wrong track.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Drum and Drummer
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Q and Joe convince shoppers to repeat odd catch phrases, then go mental as psychoanalysts. Plus, tonight's losers perform at a halftime show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 5
programme.desc: The guys dine and discuss their week. Find out who can make the best meal and how long Q's beard has become.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 4
programme.desc: You're cordially invited to a one-of-a-kind dinner party at Joe, Q, Murr, and Sal's homes from the comfort of your own.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Silence of the Lame
programme.desc: It's all play and no work when the guys square off in a toy-pitching competition. And tonight's big loser has to quiet down patrons in a food court.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q don absurd disguises to trick unsuspecting receptionists, then try to convince strangers to sign off on some unusual emails. Plus, the big loser turns a harmless dance class into a dance with danger.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pulling the Rug
programme.desc: The guys run a surprise challenge, and a stint at The Cake Boss's counter is anything but sweet. Then, advice for kida turns awkward when heard by strangers, and tonight's loser looks for a new 'do.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Running of the Bullies
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal offer up peculiar specials at a steakhouse and get creepy while helping to clean a prop house. Plus, tonight's big loser realizes he may need his own lifeguard after making waves at the pool.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Taunted House
programme.desc: The guys get extra cheesy at a pizza parlour, and then head to Wall Street where they ask strangers to help translate bizarre text messages in Spanish. Then, trapped in a haunted house, a nightmare comes to life for tonight's big loser.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Big Uneasy
programme.desc: The guys take over New Orleans, as they steal sips from strangers' drinks at a famous bar, spin the Wheel of Voo-Doom on Bourbon Street, and crash some horse and buggy rides. Then, tonight's loser turns into a legendary swamp monster.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Feathered and Fried
programme.desc: It's the king of fried food versus the king of brunch, as chef Thomas Boemer sizes up against Chef Darnell Ferguson to take Bobby Flay's crown. These chefs have the support of Anne Burrell and Marc Murphy.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Familiar Names and Faces
programme.desc: Ted Allen and Sunny Anderson step into the arena, but this time they're switching things up to ensure a win. They've brought in Bobby Flay's friend and chef, Stephen Kalt, and Marc Vetri's protégé, Brad Spence, in hopes of knocking Bobby down a peg.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Fancy Vs. Rustic
programme.desc: The claws are out as "The Kitchen's" Sunny Anderson and Katie Lee try their best to take down Bobby Flay. They've brought in polar opposites, sweet but ferocious Angie Berry and Italian stallion Giuliano Matarese, who are both gunning for victory.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Deja Flay
programme.desc: Beat Bobby Flay winner Anne Burrell is ready to battle once again, but this time she'll have to cook against hotshot chef Marcus Samuelsson. Food Network's Scott Conant sits back and relaxes as his dream team takes center stage.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Bear-Ware
programme.desc: The "Bear," Hal Holden-Bache, stands against model-turned-chef Derek Orrell in an all-out culinary battle. Iron Chef Alex Guarnaschelli and "The Chew's" Daphne Oz will decide which chef gets the chance to take down Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Record Breaking
programme.desc: It's West Coast versus East Coast as Michelin-starred Jarad Gallagher and worldly Joshua Bedford aim to teach Bobby Flay a thing or two in the kitchen. Here to lead them to victory are celebrity chef Josh Capon and sportscaster Jaymee Sire.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Go Nuts!
programme.desc: Christmas Cookie Challenge pals Ree Drummond and Eddie Jackson join forces to decide who has what it takes to get the job done against Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Beauty And The Beast
programme.desc: The arena gets a facelift when New York City's small but mighty chef Deb Caplan takes on Beantown's Nicholas Lisotto.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: Top 5 Relationship Countdown
programme.desc: Restaurant Impossible is about more than just restaurants - it's about people. Robert Irvine recounts his Top 5 most memorable Restaurant Impossible relationships.

programme.title: Summer Rush: The Last Week of Summer
programme.desc: In the week leading up to Labor Day, the Foys and their restaurants are under pressure to bring in customers and their dollars before the summer is over. Not all of the Foys are on track to reach their profit goals to survive the rest of the year.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Ready, Set, Grill!
programme.desc: The BBQ princess, Leslie Roark Scott, goes up against the queen of pork, Jess DeSham Timmons, for a chance to grill Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Weiner Takes All
programme.desc: America's yummiest hot dogs include a French fry and gravy dog, alligator dog and a cream-cheesy dream dog.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Deli-Licious
programme.desc: We are serving up deli dishes beyond your wildest cheat day fantasies including a 4-pound meat fortress stacked with a full case of deli delights in New York and a toasted French bun filled with mounds of beef brisket with Carolina BBQ glaze in Georgia.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Eat, Drink, Play
programme.desc: Great food calls for great entertainment, and these places offer spectacles that make memorable side dishes to incredible meals, from Tex-Mex meatballs fueling music fans in Dallas to a comedy show featuring fresh Atlantic seafood in Maine.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Worldwide Flavorfest
programme.desc: Guy starts this trip in Cincinnati at a Jamaican joint firing up their trademark jerk chicken and spicy snapper. Then, he stops ion Boston at a lunch place that is serving up authentic Italian.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Great Gear
programme.desc: Guy's grabbing grub cooked up with some great gear. In San Francisco, a place firin' up lights-out lamb and huge pork biscuits in some of the city's last remaining indoor smokers.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Soup-Centric
programme.desc: Guy is filling up on some soup. In Baltimore, the authentic Irish pub is serving seafood gumbo and a twist on traditional corned beef and cabbage.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sandwiches, Spaetzle and Sticky Wings
programme.desc: Guy's caught up in a whirlwind of flavors when he visits Norfolk, Virginia. A two-for-one spot where a bomb butcher stacks sandwiches by day and a chef firing up ramen and sticky wings takes over at night.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Kraut to Couscous
programme.desc: Guy looks for some global flavour favourites in small joints all across America.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Cross Country Comfort Food
programme.desc: Guy is finding great food from the ski slopes to the sea. In Miami, a law student who has traded in his suit for a chef coat is making all kinds of comfort food, from spicy ox tail to big ragu.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Stuffed and Twisted
programme.desc: Guy is checking out funky foods from coast to coast. In Monterey California, the second generation Italian place is serving mom's recipes like meaty lasagne and minestrone.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Global Comfort
programme.desc: Guy travels to find feel good food including mofongo, one Guy's all time favourites.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Red Skies in the Morning
programme.desc: It's week two of the season, and boats are hunting down the elusive King crab; a vicious storm kicks up and a Mayday goes out; the Skippers are glued to their radios, waiting to hear the fate of eleven brother fishermen in distress.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Stay Focused or Die
programme.desc: The fleet dials into the crab and a typhoon is taking its toll. When a bout sinks, tragic stories abound on the fleet. Yet, as soon as the weather clears, the men are sent back to fishing. The men have to stay focused to escape death.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Put Up or Shut Up
programme.desc: It's the fourth week of the season and already seven souls have perished, but the men must keep hunting for crab. Some of them start to crack due to the gruelling hours.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Long Haul, Short Fuses
programme.desc: The crab pots are coming up empty, while low bait and long grinds take our crews to dark places and the smallest infraction from a Greenhorn or fellow deckhand cause tempers to flare.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Deadline
programme.desc: A new deadline is set and an upcoming drop in the price of king crab has the skippers rushing to finish their season. Meanwhile crew battles and a fierce arctic storm stands in the way.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Down to the Wire
programme.desc: The King Crab Season is down to the wire and skippers are desperate to top off their quotas. It looks bleak as crews pick through bone-yards of fished out rounds. Some boats dig deep for an end of season sprint while other just scrape by.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Payback Time
programme.desc: It's the start of the 2009 opilio crab season, and anything the Bering Sea held back during king crab season is now being paid out in spades. The skippers have their eyes on the oncoming ice pack, but it's a lethal, 40-foot rogue wave that's on the hunt

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Everything on the Line
programme.desc: The 2008 King crab fleet faces huge stakes before boats even cast off; Skippers Keith and Phil could be sidelined by life threatening illnesses and all the boats are in debt from summer repairs; a skipper is pressured to take a potentially fatal risk.

programme.desc: A senior dog is given a chance at a forever home. A rescue is complicated by the presence of two dogs. Later, the family discovers their personal dogs' origins when Tia surprises them with DNA test kits.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Mama Drama
programme.desc: Moe and Lizzy rescue a sick, scared stray, but a diagnosis proves tricky. A friend of the rescue visits in hope of adopting a dog that has previously been overlooked.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Treading Water
programme.desc: Tania and Mariah make it their mission to help two puppies diagnosed with swimmer's syndrome take their first steps. Marcel rescues a stray dog trapped beneath a house. And a couple from New York are looking for a companion to share their active lives.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: The Galapagos Giant
programme.desc: Forrest is in the Galapagos seeking the Fernandina Tortoise, an animal that was only seen once, over 100 years ago. The clues are here, along with an abundance of incredibly unique species, raising hopes of a historic discovery.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: The Caribbean Monk Seal
programme.desc: Forrest sets off on a dangerous, shark-infested search for the extinct Caribbean monk seal. To prove its existence, he and the crew descend into deep waters where they come face-to-face with a giant tiger shark.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: The Hidden Turtle of Vietnam
programme.desc: In Vietnam, Forrest teams up with a conservation group to save the largest turtle species in the world from extinction. Using cutting edge technology, they attempt to find a suitor for the last and only surviving giant softshell.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: Madagascar Dwarf Hippo
programme.desc: Known for being a pint-size version of its African cousin, the Malagasy dwarf hippo has been written off as extinct for 1000 years. Forrest and a local biologist to trek through the bush of Madagascar to prove it still survives.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: The Legendary Cape Lion
programme.desc: Forrest ventures home to Zimbabwe in search of the mysterious Cape Lion, a massive black-maned predator. He and the crew navigate the African bush determined to get DNA proof, facing threats of charging rhinos and huge prides of lions.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: Colombian Dinosaur
programme.desc: Deep in the jungles of Colombia, Forrest is on a mission to prove the Rio Apaporis Caiman still exists. Locals believe this crocodilian resides within a lawless land inhabited by guerilla rebels, kidnappers, and deadly predators.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: Ivory Billed Woodpecker of the Bayou
programme.desc: Forrest is determined to find out if the famously reclusive Ivory Billed Woodpecker still exists. The alligator and poisonous snake infested swamps of Louisiana make for a challenging mission, but he is prepared for anything.

programme.desc: While Dre and Bow take Zoey on a trip to visit Bow's alma mater, Brown University, Dre battles with his fear of flying through a little pharmaceutical assistance to get him through the flight.

programme.title: Nostradamus Effect: Secrets of the Seven Seals
programme.desc: The Book of Revelation is one of the most terrifying and controversial books of the Bible, it states that mankind's end will come over a seven-year period that sees Jesus coming back for his final battle between good and evil.

programme.title: Nostradamus Effect: Fatima's Lost Prophecy
programme.desc: In 1917 three young children from the small town of Fatima, Portugal claimed to be instruments of the divine prophecy. They reported being visited by the Virgin Mary, and tell their visions of death and destruction.

programme.title: Nostradamus Effect: Armageddon Battle Plan

programme.title: Nostradamus Effect: The Rapture

programme.title: Nostradamus Effect: The Apocalypse Code
programme.desc: Sir Isaac Newton predicted a shocking new date of the Apocalypse. Though he was famous for discovering gravity and laws of motion, few knew he also possessed a very dark, mysterious side and an obsession with alchemy and Biblical prophecy.

programme.title: Nostradamus Effect: Satan's Army
programme.desc: Less then 100 years after the birth of Christ, John the Apostle had a vision of Satan's final war against God.

programme.title: Nostradamus Effect: The Third Antichrist
programme.desc: Nostradamus saw the arrival of the three antichrists that would plague mankind. Who are they and when will they actually come? Is it possible to decode Nostradamus' visions in time to ward off the apocalypse?

programme.title: Nostradamus: 21st Century Prophecies Revealed
programme.desc: Innovative analysis gives us the chance to finally crack Nostradamus's cryptic code. The emerging truth is that Nostradamus may indeed have possessed a special gift that made his predictions so accurate, but it's something we may all be able to tap into.

programme.desc: A beloved grandmother and her new husband go missing, triggering an investigation that reveals a twisted tale of first love and a motive fueled by obsession and greed.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: What happened in Cara Ryan's bedroom was a mystery. She admitted she shot her ex-husband, but investigators needed to know if it was murder or self-defense. Detectives heard several versions of the story, but for a jury, there was only one truth.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Plot Twist
programme.desc: For a group of stage actors, life seemed to be imitating art in the worst way when a young college student was killed. Police believed they knew who was responsible, but this mystery had a grand finale no one saw coming.

programme.title: Dateline: Mystery in Mustang
programme.desc: Keith Bryan is Mustang, OK's local heroic fireman. Having recently reconciled with his wife, life seems to be on the mend, until a brutal attack in his home leaves his dear wife a widower.

programme.title: Dateline: Broken Bonds
programme.desc: A quiet night was shattered when intruders terrorized a Florida couple and their young son, killing one of them. Investigators questioned the initial story. Then, a tip led them to another family with dark secrets, and that's when bonds were tested.

programme.title: Dateline: Mystery at Ascot Estates
programme.desc: When Brett Parker returned to his home in Charlston SC, he discovered the dead bodies of his beloved wife and her friend. At first, it seemed like a robbery gone wrong. However, a closer look at the clues reveals a much darker twisted tale.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Troubled Waters
programme.desc: A couple's romantic boat trip turns tragic when a young wife is lost at sea. The case was cold for years until a model with a checkered past goes undercover to find the truth.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Tangled
programme.desc: At first it looked like a home invasion gone wrong, a robbery that resulted in the murder of Ralph Candelario's wife, Pam. Ralph was found at the crime scene dazed and confused but his confusing story had police questioning his version of events.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Circumstances
programme.desc: It was an unthinkable crime. Brittany Eldridge was nearly nine months pregnant when she was found dead in her apartment. Investigators focused on two men believing both had a possible motive but were they capable of murder.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: A Crack in Everything
programme.desc: For many, the holiday season is filled with joy but, for the Jennings family, the night before Christmas became a waking nightmare. A gunshot rang out and investigators had to unravel whether a secret lead to a tragic suicide or if this was murder.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Secrets in Seattle
programme.desc: Nicole Pietz was a well-liked fitness executive married to the man of her dreams. Then one night, she didn't show up for dinner with her husband and friends.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Twisted in Texas
programme.desc: Meghan Verikas had been attracted to Leon Jacob, in part, because as a doctor he saved lives. Now police officers were telling her he was trying to hire a hitman, potentially to take hers. But authorities had a plan of their own.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Knock at the Door
programme.desc: Tara Ord was a beautiful young woman with big dreams. Then suddenly she vanished. With little evidence to go on, it would take years for determined cold case detectives to uncover the long buried clue that blew this case wide open.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Stealing Paradise
programme.desc: A group of adventurous Americans thought they had found paradise. It was a tropical hideaway, the kind of place where people didn't ask a lot of questions about their neighbors, until some of those neighbors started to disappear.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: At Close Range
programme.desc: Keith Reed was a highly-regarded school superintendent. When he didn't show up at an out-of-town conference, it set off alarm bells. Investigators took a hard look at his love life for clues and made a startling discovery.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Other Side of Paradise
programme.desc: Sandra Galas was born and raised in paradise. So how did something so ugly happen there? Police investigated two men in Sandra's life, but the case went cold. Her father refused to give up, relentlessly pursuing the truth for more than a decade.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Threat
programme.desc: She was a divorced mother excited about her next chapter in life. Then, five gunshots shattered her plans. Proving who murdered Joan Lockwood was a daunting task for police. An ominous killer was still out there and her family was living in fear.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: The Black Hole Next Door

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of Poltergeist Hill
programme.desc: When a ghostly encounter in a cemetery is caught on camera, experts use cutting-edge tech and the latest science to investigate if something paranormal is at play.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Freak of the Deep
programme.desc: Deep sea explorers discover an unknown monster thousands of feet beneath the ocean. Killer fog threatens a town in the American Midwest. A truck spontaneously explodes on a busy freeway.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: When Bigfoot Attacks
programme.desc: When cameras record a strange creature in the wilderness perform an incredible feat of strength, some suspect it's hard proof of Bigfoot; using cutting-edge science, experts investigate if they've discovered the spawn of Sasquatch and Iron Man.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Omen of the Nuke Mutants
programme.desc: When horrifying creatures wash ashore on America's Pacific Coast, some speculate that these monsters are mutants created by the nuclear accident at Fukushima; using the latest science and technology, experts uncover a truth far stranger than fiction.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: When Bigfoot Attacks
programme.desc: When cameras record a strange creature in the wilderness perform an incredible feat of strength, some suspect it's hard proof of Bigfoot; using cutting-edge science, experts investigate if they've discovered the spawn of Sasquatch and Iron Man.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Omen of the Nuke Mutants
programme.desc: When horrifying creatures wash ashore on America's Pacific Coast, some speculate that these monsters are mutants created by the nuclear accident at Fukushima; using the latest science and technology, experts uncover a truth far stranger than fiction.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Freak of the Deep
programme.desc: Deep sea explorers discover an unknown monster thousands of feet beneath the ocean. Killer fog threatens a town in the American Midwest. A truck spontaneously explodes on a busy freeway.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of Alien Stonehenge
programme.desc: An alien Stonehenge with a sinister purpose, an eerie building filled with strange labyrinths, and an endless concrete track in the middle of nowhere are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: City of the Damned
programme.desc: A deserted town in Spain with a bloody past and a ghost fleet heading nowhere are homes to dark secrets.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Haunting on Plague Island
programme.desc: A strange complex of buildings on a remote tropical island was once home to a large seaside community, but today, locals avoid the area and claim that it's haunted. New discoveries reveal why this eerie place was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Escobar's Castle
programme.desc: The ruins of a once-palatial compound contain the secrets of one of history's most notorious criminals. Plus, new discoveries reveal why this high-security estate was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Pompeii's Gate to Hell
programme.desc: An eerie complex of underground tunnels snake beneath a volcano near the ruins of Pompeii, and some believe these passages were intended as a gateway to hell. New discoveries are revealing exactly why they were built, and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: MythBusters: Deadliest Catch Crabtastic Special
programme.desc: Deadliest Catch captains Johnathan and Junior join the Mythbusters to test a crab pot.

programme.title: MythBusters: Let There Be Light
programme.desc: Jamie and Adam test a Hollywood lighting myth.

programme.title: MythBusters: Fire in the Hole
programme.desc: The MythBusters tackle some of Hollywood's favourite explosive scenarios. Find out if a hero could really shoot a live grenade in midair and thus render it useless. Also, see if you could really contain a TNT explosion inside a file cabinet or aquarium.

programme.title: MythBusters: Blow It Out the Water
programme.desc: Adam and Jamie blow up a boat with 1,000 pounds of high explosives before building a homemade machine gun from Breaking Bad's season finale.

programme.title: MythBusters: Duct Tape Canyon
programme.desc: Lost in the wilderness, Adam and Jamie survive the desert, repel down canyon cliff-faces, and brave Class 5 rapids, all with duct tape and bubble wrap.

programme.title: MythBusters: Accidental Ammo
programme.desc: Stand by for some ballistic backyard bedlam and a gruesome glass guillotine in an episode devoted to accidental ammo.

programme.title: MythBusters: Tanker Crush
programme.desc: In their farewell season Adam and Jamie take on their biggest ever experiment ever in an attempt to crush a giant tanker train car by creating a vacuum.

programme.title: How It's Made: Putty Knives, Garage Doors, Electric Motors, Wool
programme.desc: Learn how putty knives, garage doors, electric motors, and wool are made.

programme.title: How It's Made: Foosball Tables, Marseille Soap, and Laguiole Pocket Knives
programme.desc: Find out how foosball tables, marseille soap and laguiole pocket knives are made.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: A Night Alone
programme.desc: College sophomore Gina Tenney is thrilled to be living all on her own. That is until she discovers she's got a stalker. And when she and her tormentor finally come face-to-face, it brings an even bigger surprise: this secret admirer is no stranger.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: One Last Goodbye
programme.desc: After breaking free from her controlling ex-husband, single mom Tanya Petro doesn't have much time to date. Until she meets Ron Gibson and falls helplessly in love with him. But just a few months into the relationship, Tanya mysteriously disappears.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Firestarter
programme.desc: 20-year-old Audrey Mabrey is sure she has found Mr. Right when she connects with NYPD Detective Chris Hanney. But as the couple prepares for a life down in Florida, skeletons from their life in New York start to surface.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Wished My Son Were Dead
programme.desc: It has been more than 25 years, yet Joyce Alexander is still terrified of her son, William Patrick Alexander. She fears he holds her responsible for his horrifying crime, and is convinced he is plotting his revenge from prison.

programme.title: Dead Reckoning: A Shot in the Night
programme.desc: 33 year-old single mother, Lindsey Wilkins in found shot in the head by an apparent suicide. When no gun is found, police suspect murder and soon uncover a trail of dark secrets and deadly betrayals. Then a shocking twist puts the case in jeopardy.

programme.title: A Time to Kill: Betrayed
programme.desc: When newlyweds Joe and Olga Connell are gunned down outside their Wilmington, Delaware home, police must investigate a sibling rivalry, a business partnership plagued by drugs, and an outlaw motorcycle gang.

programme.title: American Monster: In Sickness and in Health
programme.desc: When outgoing Beth Spaulding meets shy Jason Risenburg it seems that love has conquered loneliness and the two quickly marry. Illness and bad luck push their happiness to the brink, triggering a tornado of lies and deception that tears them apart.

programme.title: Dead Reckoning: A Shot in the Night
programme.desc: 33 year-old single mother, Lindsey Wilkins in found shot in the head by an apparent suicide. When no gun is found, police suspect murder and soon uncover a trail of dark secrets and deadly betrayals. Then a shocking twist puts the case in jeopardy.

programme.title: A Time to Kill: Betrayed
programme.desc: When newlyweds Joe and Olga Connell are gunned down outside their Wilmington, Delaware home, police must investigate a sibling rivalry, a business partnership plagued by drugs, and an outlaw motorcycle gang.

programme.title: American Monster: The Green Monster
programme.desc: In rural Ohio, an intruder brutally guns down Jack and Linda Myers in their sleep. The only witness is their sleepy 4-year-old grandson. But their extensive home movies - aired here for the first time - may have captured a monster lurking in their midst.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Blood Atonement
programme.desc: Estephania LeBaron was raised to believe that her father and brothers were holy men, and that the terrible things they did in God's name were just. But she questions everything when faced with having to do the same terrible things herself.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Deadly Obsession
programme.desc: Tom and Lynette's love story spans decades from grade school to a posh house with a pool. But dark secrets from the bedroom bleed out onto other aspects of the marriage... and a dangerous obsession rips their romance into pieces.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Bored to Death
programme.desc: When Opal Skidmore marries Steven Williams, their love is a second chance for the pair to live out their dreams. Until boredom and the lure of the open road spark hidden desires and sexual hijinks leaving this open marriage anything but happy.

programme.title: Primal Instinct: From Diamonds to Death
programme.desc: Ann McDonald's wealthy husband Rich cares more about social status than her happiness. When she seeks solace in Al Braunberger's arms, it unleashes a side of Rich she's never seen and a side of Al she never expected, trapping her in a deadly game.

programme.title: Primal Instinct: Catfish Killer
programme.desc: In a small Tennessee town, Jenelle Potter has few friends. When her attraction to one of them isn't mutual, she is ostracized and feels threatened. Then a shadowy figure guides her family into a dark plot with a twisted ending no one saw coming.

programme.title: Primal Instinct: Red Wedding
programme.desc: A chance encounter on a NY subway brings hard-working immigrant Gladys Ricart love, and introduces her to a lush world she'd never imagined. But her plans for a dream wedding turn into a devastating nightmare.

programme.title: Web of Lies: The Child Network
programme.desc: A woman adopts a 6-year-old on an online re-homing forum for children. She's soon inspired to help re-home other children, but is horrified when she discovers two of the children may have fallen into the clutches of a child abuser.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Casual Encounters
programme.desc: George Weber is on the New York morning radio show. When he doesn't show for work, police discover his mutilated body in his apartment. Investigation of his on line activity exposes George's private life and may provide the key to nailing his murderer.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Friend Request
programme.desc: Megan Meier, a vulnerable 13-year old living in a small town in Missouri, turns to the internet for socialization outside of school. When she meets 16-year old Josh online, she falls in love. But this love story turns tragic as the web of lies unravels.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Pipe Nightmare
programme.desc: Barry Hornstein accidentally detonates a pipe bomb in his own driveway when he kicks a mysterious package. Suddenly, an online terror campaign against his 17-year old son ensues, leading police to wonder who wants to hurt the Hornsteins, and why?

programme.title: Web of Lies: Love You to Death
programme.desc: Adopted 17-year-old Chelsea Schobert has always felt out of place at home. She seeks acceptance online where she meets Shawn. But as their relationship develops, all is not as it seems and the whole family is drawn into a devastating series of events.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Online Education
programme.desc: Texas A&M University professor Dr. Jim Aune appears to have it all, but unknown to his family or students, his life is in freefall as dark online secrets threaten to spill out into real life.

programme.title: Web of Lies: The Candyman
programme.desc: Candy Williams has recently moved to the idyllic beach town of Gulfport, Florida. When she a meets handsome stranger at the beach, she thinks life can't get any better. But a fantasy romance becomes a real life horror story as his past comes to life.

programme.title: Web of Lies: The Deadly Hoax
programme.desc: When a tech-savvy computer whiz fails to make the grade as a pro video gamer, he becomes obsessed with finding internet infamy. What starts as an online prank spirals into a new, deadly crime called 'swatting' that chills the nation.

programme.title: What History Forgot: To the Ends of the World
programme.desc: Delve into the unknown stories behind some of the biggest disasters, threats and conquests in America's skies. From the attack on Pearl Harbor, the Hindenburg disaster, Apollo 13 and the race to the Moon.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Rebels With a Cause
programme.desc: Rosa parks was not the first African American women to refuse to give up her seat. The Berlin Airlift included candy for kids. One of the great rifles used in war was invented by a man who made moonshine.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Secret Weapons
programme.desc: Discover the unknown stories of some of the incredible plots, ploys and people behind America's secret weapons during the Cold War, the Vietnam War, and WWII.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: American Nazis
programme.desc: From the rallies held at Madison Square Garden, to the plots to steal the secrets to the nation's weapons of war, the American Nazis terrorize the United States in the 1930s and wage a battle against the FBI and an undercover team of amateur spies.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Gold
programme.desc: A look at the history of gold, where most of it resides today and who owns it.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Las Vegas
programme.desc: Unravel the seamy secrets of Las Vegas. Where Mobsters once ruled. Where casinos suck you in to keep you playing and losing. See why this was a Nazi target for wartime sabotage, a test ground for atomic bombs and a meeting place for 9/11's terrorists.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Experimental Soldiers
programme.desc: At the height of the Cold War, the United States of America searches for a way to create a generation of 'Supersoldiers' who use telepathy to win battles. In the 1950s gangster Whitey Bulger volunteers for the CIA's LSD project known as MK-Ultra.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Canyon Country Playground
programme.desc: A big family on a large property wants to replace their old patio and pool with an updated design. Mike and Jim deliver on the dream by transforming the yard into a canyon country playground. The backyard oasis includes a lazy river and a cave.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Mountain Lake Resort Pool
programme.desc: An active family in southern California wants an extravagant pool to remind them of their favorite lakeside vacations. The kings don't know which is bigger, their clients' wish list or the 20-foot jumping cliff they have to create from scratch.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Mountain Paradise
programme.desc: The Kings take on their most spectacular project to date when a young family asks them to build the perfect pool for their dream home overlooking the mountains outside Ogden, Utah. They want the works including a 50 ft. long, 12 ft. deep pool.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Dream Pool for a Dream Home
programme.desc: The kings create a resort in a family's backyard that includes a waterfall grotto with a slide and infinity edge. Additional elements include a splash pad and sun shelf, transforming the yard from barren to beautiful.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Twice as Nice
programme.desc: A Kentucky couple seeks out the kings to help them revamp their worn-out lakeside swimming pool. The guys accept the challenge and turn the eyesore into a backyard paradise complete with a custom slide, secondary pool and more.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Spa Fabulous
programme.desc: After recovering from a harrowing parachuting incident, a military veteran learned to walk again, got married, started a family and is now ready to build a pool. The custom oasis includes a jumping rock, a Baja shelf and plunge spa.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Rockin' it in Rocket City
programme.desc: Lucas goes to Huntsville, Alabama to build the lifelong dream pool of a retiring military couple. Lucas designs the largest grotto enclosed spa and widest waterfall of his career. This build also requires a tornado shelter.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Old Pool, New Dreams
programme.desc: These homeowners have big backyard dreams, but their outdated pools and spas are getting in the way.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Waterpark Wonderland
programme.desc: Pool genius Lucas transforms a neglected backyard into a waterpark wonderland. With his most extreme remodel yet, Lucas creates a family fun zone, complete with waterslide and double decker outdoor party space. But it's not all fun 'n games.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Fiesta de Laguna
programme.desc: It's fiesta time as pool designer Lucas Congdon and his crew are challenged to create a Mexican resort in a Venice, Florida residential backyard. Lucas encounters several design 'firsts' on his journey to infuse the flavors of Mexico into his creation.
