programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1700s First Floor Restoration
programme.desc: Carpenter Jeff Devlin is recruited by homeowners Scott and Rhonda to fully restore the first floor sunroom, living room and dining room of their 1700s stone home.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1803 Second Floor Overhaul
programme.desc: Carpenter Jeff Devlin heads to the home of Jodie and JP to check out the original second floor of their 1803 stone home. The space has been sectioned off over time, and the homeowners want a more cohesive master suite that evokes the home's history.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1800s Original Kitchen Restoration
programme.desc: Jeff is called on to renovate a dated kitchen believed to be in the same spot as the original one that was built in the 1800s. By restoring much of the kitchen's history, Jeff and team are able to bring in a classic farmhouse style to the home.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1790 Three-Room Restoration
programme.desc: Jeff meets Allen and Kathleen, a couple who wants him to restore three rooms in the original portion of their 1790 home. Jeff and his team dig into each space, uncovering a few unique original details and adding other historic features.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1740 Little House Restoration
programme.desc: Jeff is recruited to restore a 1740 stone home that sits behind couple Kelly and Rob's suburban 1990s home. They call it the "little house," and it sat right in the middle of the action of one of the most famous Revolutionary War battles.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1800s Kitchen and Dining Room
programme.desc: A couple have just bought an historic stone home with portions built in the 1700s, 1800s, and 1990s. They want Jeff to look at their dining room, kitchen and sunroom. They want a more open floor plan, but Jeff will have to move stone walls.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1859 Kitchen Restoration
programme.desc: Jeff is recruited by friends Scott and Melanie to renovate the 1980s kitchen addition on their 1859 farmhouse. The previous owner did his best to preserve some 19th century style, but the layout doesn't work and the features are dated.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1737 Entryway and Kitchen
programme.desc: Lisa and Tom ask Jeff to work on their 1737 stone home in Plymouth Meeting, Pennsylvania. They ask him to address the first floor and the kitchen. Jeff and his team bring unique 1800s elements into the entryway room and give the kitchen an 1800s overhaul.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Run Down Family Rental
programme.desc: Ashley and Michael take on a rundown, family-owned 1939 craftsman. The project is an emotional journey for the duo as the bland home is transformed into a breath-taking abode with room expansions and some inspired flooring choices.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: The Kettle House
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley get the opportunity to renovate a bizarre Galveston icon that may harbor a few surprises inside. The spaceship-shaped landmark is soon brimming with life as the Cordrays bring their unique charm to the one-of-a-kind house.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Fire Salvaged Victorian
programme.desc: Ashley and Michael see hidden potential in a fire-damaged Victorian and decide to save it from demolition. They open up the cramped space by turning a breezeway into a kitchen and repurpose an old safe.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Duplex Conversion
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley learn that a coveted property is for sale while crabbing off the Galveston coast.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: 1913 Beach Bungalow Restoration
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley find a rundown 1913 beach bungalow that's about to be demolished. They transform the small kitchen into a modern, open-concept space with vintage touches and restore the original hardwood floors and shiplap walls.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Back to the Beach on the Jersey Shore
programme.desc: A couple looks for a beach house in Ventnor City, New Jersey, where they can make memories with their daughter on the Jersey Shore.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Fryin' King
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to the Big Fresno Fair in California for the debut of some new fair foods, including the Flamin' Hot Chimichanga and Rainbow Shrimp Fries.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Jackie Hash Brown
programme.desc: Noah Cappe makes a visit to the world-famous Iowa State Fair to sample some award-winning new items. There's a new take on chicken and waffles and a massive meat meal all wrapped up to eat on the midway.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: On Wheels
programme.desc: Ditch the four walls, head outside, and get your fill of those portable powerhouses known as food trucks. Jeff Mauro gets happy about an angry lobster sandwich from the Happy Lobster Truck in Chicago.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Yummy in the Middle
programme.desc: It's that ooey-gooey goodness in the middle that we just can't get enough of, so we're heading straight to the middle of things to see what greatness awaits. Jeff Mauro indulges in a 100-layer vanilla creme doughnut that's full of surprises.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: The Upper Crust
programme.desc: The best part of any dish is what holds it all together: the crust! Chef Beau MacMillan's favorite pot pie in Phoenix, Arizona, takes on Duff Goldman's seafood pie pick in Baton Rouge, Louisiana.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: The Closers
programme.desc: There's no better way to end a meal than with these delicious dishes. In New York City, Martha Stewart gushes over the most irresistible piece of lemon meringue she's ever had.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Fries in Disguise
programme.desc: Noah Cappe arrives at the Volusia County Fair in Florida, where two carnival classics get a makeover for the cheesy tater corndog and the black forest funnel cake.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Dude, Where's My Carb?
programme.desc: Noah Cappe takes on the Porter County Fair in Indiana, where a pile of locally sourced pork is served three ways in a single dish.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Tons of Taters
programme.desc: Ingenious fair vendors use the humble potato to create some amazing and original midway food.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Local Legends
programme.desc: From sandwiches to desserts, Noah discovers foods that put cities on the map and some that present an entire state.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Between the Bun
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson reveals entirely excessive and utterly outrageous takes on the humble hamburger. Beef patties and two buns are required, but every other ingredient is maxed out to create the most exorbitant burgers ever imagined.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Pizza Party
programme.desc: There's so much to love about pizza- crispy crust, savory sauce, ooey-gooey cheese and endless options for toppings. Pizza might just be the perfect meal, and Eddie Jackson has a day full of out-of-the-box slices to prove it.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Borrowed Favourites
programme.desc: Sharing is caring, and the treats that family and friends love become personal favourites too! Robert Irvine takes his wife's advice and discovers the world's greatest omelet at Babystacks Cafe in Las Vegas, Nev.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Trigger Foods
programme.desc: We're losing all control and giving in to ultimate food cravings. Geoffrey Zakarian starts things off like never before with the most juicy and succulent roast chicken from New York City. Jonathon Sawyer takes it to the next level.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: Leather-Bound Cake
programme.desc: A cake that looks identical to four, legal-bound volumes for a publishing company; a cake that is the same shape and size of a Shetland pony; a wedding cake specialist creates a cake that is over two foot tall.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: Groovy And Bubbly Cakes
programme.desc: Molly gets wound up in her sheep cake for a new yarn shop, and Phil and Christine spin out a groovy, life-size record player cake. Eloise perfects a giant prosecco bottle for a celebration, and Karisha juggles bridesmaid duties and cake baking.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: Make-Up To Cake-Up
programme.desc: Molly draws on her skills as a former makeup artist to design a stunning head and shoulders birthday cake. Phil's and Christine's cake artistry make the fruit even sweeter for a historic celebration.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Carnivals, Cityscapes and Glowing Cakes
programme.desc: Romance combines with rides and roller coasters on a carnival-themed wedding cake complete with a tunnel of love.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Surprise Filled Cakes
programme.desc: A rancher's birthday party calls for a pair of larger-than-life cowboy boots. Next, the Texas Reptile Zoo celebrates with a realistic snake cake that blows everyone's mind. Finally, two special cakes are filled with hidden surprises.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Gravity-Defying Musical Cakes
programme.desc: A 50s-themed cake with a working jukebox is music to everyone's ears and an out-of-this-world wedding cake gets filled with hand-sculpted edible zombies! Next, an alligator groom's cake looks like it crawled right out of the swamp.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Out of This World Upside Down Cakes
programme.desc: An upside-down wedding cake hanging from a chandelier is covered in sparkly rhinestones for the big day, plus an edible truck jumps over a Vegas ghost town. The planet Earth is made of cake, and one baker creates a realistic, 3D motorcycle cake.

programme.desc: Cricket leaves Gloria to work the coffee shop alone while he enjoys the parade on his break.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Level Up/ Wild Side
programme.desc: Bill gets addicted to a farm-simulating video game. Cricket's feral wild side takes over when Bill is unable to replicate their old camping trips.

programme.title: Amphibia: A Night at the Inn/ Wally and Anne
programme.desc: The Plantars stay at an inn for a night, but Polly discovers the caretakers aren’t what they seem. Everyone calls Anne crazy when she claims to have seen the Moss Man.

programme.title: The Owl House: The Intruder
programme.desc: Luz and King must defend The Owl House from a mysterious intruder.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Frame Story/ And ... Action!
programme.desc: The principal accuses Kick of a crime he didn't commit, threatening to expel him from school. When Kick meets his female counterpart in a popular TV actress, he helps her discover her inner daredevil.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Things That Make You Go Boom!/ Kyle Be Back
programme.desc: Kick battles Brad to win a scavenger hunt; Kick's cousin tries to break a stunt record.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Pool Daze/ Live-In Wade
programme.desc: Kick leads his friends in a battle for freedom and fun when the lifeguards at the community pool force them to stay in the kiddie pool.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Kart to Kart/ Kyle 2.0
programme.desc: When Gordie Gibble buys Mellowbrook's go-kart track, he bans the Buttowskis. Kick spends time with cousin Kyle in order to score tickets to Dirk Bike Mike's Demo-Cross.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Sleepy River Wild/ Power Play
programme.desc: Gunther falls asleep on a waterpark ride/ Kick tries to get out of playing Romeo.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Bad Table Manners/ Petrified!

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Knocked Out/ Not Without My Cereal

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket's Kapowie! / Car Trouble

programme.title: Big City Greens: Family Legacy/ Paint Misbehavin'
programme.desc: Gramma tells Cricket and Tilly that there’s treasure buried on their property.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Urban Legend/ Wishing Well

programme.title: Big City Greens: Rated Cricket / Homeshare Hoedown

programme.title: Big City Greens: Shark Objects / Dream Weaver

programme.title: Movie: X-Men: First Class
programme.desc: The United States government asks the Mutants to help stop an evil dictator who is planning to start World War III.

programme.title: Perry Mason: Chapter One
programme.desc: On the heels of an unsavory investigation involving a famous comedian, struggling private Perry Mason eye is hired by an attorney to solve the brutal kidnapping of a one-year-old child who parents were targeted for a $100,000 ransom.

programme.title: Movie: It Chapter Two
programme.desc: The children who encountered a terrifying creature called Pennywise encounter it again as adults.

programme.title: I May Destroy You: Don't Forget the Sea
programme.desc: Three months earlier, Terry visits Arabella in Ostia, Italy, where she's living large on her agents' dime. After procuring party favors, Arabella and Terry each have a wild night of their own.

programme.title: Movie: Punch Drunk Love
programme.desc: A beleaguered small-business owner embarks on a romantic journey with a mysterious woman.

programme.title: Movie: The Take
programme.desc: An armoured car driver survives a hijacking and hunts down his attacker who committed the crime.

programme.title: Movie: Prisoners
programme.desc: A father kidnaps the main suspect when his young daughter and her friend go missing, while the lead detective races against the clock to unravel the case before it's too late. They soon discover that all is not as it seems.

programme.title: Movie: The Abyss
programme.desc: A civilian diving team is enlisted to search for a lost nuclear submarine and face danger while encountering an alien aquatic species.

programme.title: Movie: Valkyrie
programme.desc: A plot to assassinate Hitler begins when German officers and politicians see the downfall of Germany coming. All is arranged, but things start to go wrong and turn the plan into a tragedy.

programme.title: Movie: The Recruit
programme.desc: A mentor asks a talented young CIA trainee to help find a mole inside the agency.

programme.title: Movie: Kin
programme.desc: On the same day that his older brother is released from prison, a boy finds a deadly alien weapon in a junkyard. With a revenge-seeking crime lord, inquisitive government agents and dangerous alien soldiers all after them, the brothers go on the run.

programme.title: Movie: Ford V. Ferrari
programme.desc: A designer and a race car driver try to build Ford a race car that can beat Ferrari at the 24 Hours of Le Mans in 1966.

programme.title: Movie: Aquaman
programme.desc: A man learns that he is the half-human, half-Atlantean heir to an undersea kingdom that is ruled by his half-brother who plans to wage a devastating war on the surface world, forcing him to become a leader and challenge his brother for the throne.

programme.title: Movie: Michael Clayton
programme.desc: An attorney, the Fixer, comes across the biggest case in his career; however, it could produce disastrous results for those who are involved.

programme.title: I May Destroy You: Don't Forget the Sea
programme.desc: Three months earlier, Terry visits Arabella in Ostia, Italy, where she's living large on her agents' dime. After procuring party favors, Arabella and Terry each have a wild night of their own.

programme.title: Movie: Signs
programme.desc: A family living on a farm in Pennsylvania finds mysterious crop circles in their fields, which suggest something more frightening to come.

programme.title: Yvonne Orji: Mamma, I Made It
programme.desc: Yvonne Orji debuts her HBO comedy special.

programme.title: Movie: The Good Liar
programme.desc: A conman targets a wealthy widow, but his scam turns into a game of cat and mouse.

programme.title: Bully. Coward. Victim. The Story of Roy Cohn
programme.desc: This film offers an unflinching look at the infamous attorney who prosecuted Ivy Meeropol’s grandparents, Julius and Ethel Rosenberg, and later argued persuasively for their execution in what became known as the 'atomic spies' case.

programme.title: Movie: Blindspotting
programme.desc: With only three days left on his probation, Collin is determined to avoid even a small hint of illegal activity, but with his unstable best friend Miles causing trouble the two end up on a collision course that could jeopardize Collin's freedom.

programme.title: Movie: Unbreakable
programme.desc: After a man survives a horrible train accident unscathed, he learns that he may be invincible.

programme.title: Movie: Lights Out
programme.desc: Growing up, Rebecca was terrorized by the dark, never sure of what was real. Once her younger brother starts to experience the same events, she returns home to protect him. Investigating the truth, she realizes that all their lives are in danger.

programme.title: Movie: Wild Hogs
programme.desc: A group of middle-aged men try to put their troubles behind them as they set out on a road trip on their Harleys.

programme.title: Movie: Downton Abbey
programme.desc: The Crawley family and their household continue the story begun in the series of the same name. It is now 1927, and the King and Queen of England are planning a visit to the Crawleys' country estate.

programme.title: Movie: Never Back Down
programme.desc: Lured into a world of underground fighting, a teen trains his mind and body to help protect those he loves.

programme.title: Movie: The Little Stranger
programme.desc: A country doctor returns to the estate where his mother once worked to tend to a patient and finds himself falling for the family's daughter, but when strange events begin to occur the family suspects something supernatural is at work in the manor.

programme.title: Movie: Hall Pass
programme.desc: Two best friends are granted permission by their wives to have extramarital affairs, but when their wives join in on the fun things get a little out of control.

programme.title: HBO First Look: The King of Staten Island
programme.desc: A behind-the-scenes look at film productions.

programme.title: Movie: The Hate U Give
programme.desc: Teenager Starr lives two lives, her home one in a poor and mostly black neighbourhood, and her school life at a rich, mostly white prep school. When she witnesses her friend get fatally shot by a police officer, she becomes torn between her two lives.

programme.title: Movie: RINGSIDE
programme.desc: Follow Kenny Sims Jr. and Destyne Butler Jr. as they begin their journey as gifted boxers.

programme.title: Movie: Mob Town
programme.desc: Heads of various crime family gather to meet in upstate New York in 1957.

programme.title: Shameless: Nana Gallagher Had an Affair

programme.title: Movie: Semi-Pro
programme.desc: The coach of a basketball team tries to encourage a few men to make it in the NBA.

programme.title: Movie: Norbit
programme.desc: When mild-mannered Norbit meets the woman of his dreams, he must find the courage to stand up to his overbearing girlfriend.

programme.title: Movie: The Campaign

programme.title: Arrow: Genesis
programme.desc: As Oliver and Felicity look for a magical solution to defeat Darhk, a vengeance driven Diggle gets a lead on Andy's whereabouts and heads off to confront his brother.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: My City

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Sic Semper Tyranis

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: #1 Fan
programme.desc: While preparing to leave on a fishing trip, Martha Roberts, an erratic whistleblower who calls Pride her mentor, kidnaps him to help her locate a serial killer targeting young women in the Gulf of Mexico.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: The Asset
programme.desc: Pride and his team join forces with FBI Director Isler after a Russian operative disappears after his navy escort is murdered. Also, Tammy partners with former sleeper agent Eva Azorova to locate the missing operative who Eva has known since childhood.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Dead Man Calling
programme.desc: The NCIS team investigates the copycat murder of an unsolved case from 150 years ago that spawned a legendary New Orleans ghost story.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Viral
programme.desc: Sebastian is placed on administrative leave after his response in a foot chase to apprehend a high value fugitive is questioned by the FBI. Also, while Pride and the team continue to track the target, they attempt to clear Sebastian's name.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Acceptable Loss
programme.desc: The murder of a petty officer leads Pride and his team to a mysterious woman who is targeting men with high security clearance. Also, Lasalle's father, Beau, arrives in town to discuss the family business.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: The Accident
programme.desc: NCIS is called to investigate after a clinical trial of brain implants in veterans is hacked. Also, Patton must work alongside his ex-wife, who spearheads the project.

programme.desc: A woman is whisked away to Europe when her boyfriend reveals he's actually a prince.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: That Was No Lady
programme.desc: Dorothy latest boyfriend, Glen, gives her a shock when he tells her he's married. She surprises herself when she finds herself sneaking around to be with him. Meanwhile, Blanche unloads her old car on Rose in order to buy a new one.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: In a Bed of Rose's
programme.desc: Late one evening, Rose brings a man home and they spend the night together. However, in the morning she finds that he has passed away. Even worse, she later discovers he was married.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Truth Will Out
programme.desc: Rose is apprehensive about a visit from her daughter and granddaughter, since their reason for coming is to settle Rose's late-husband's will. Meanwhile, Blanche gets caught up in the tabloids of a society murder.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Nice and Easy
programme.desc: Blanche's visiting niece is a chip right off the old block when she dates a different man all night every night. Dorothy does battle with a mouse living in the house.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Operation
programme.desc: Dorothy is hesitant about having foot surgery just as she was scheduled to tap dance with Blanche and Rose at a dance recital.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Second Motherhood
programme.desc: Blanche is romanced by a wealthy suitor who she learns has several small children. This fact dampens his proposal of marriage. Meanwhile, Dorothy and Rose go to bat with the bathroom plumbing.

programme.title: Frasier: Are You Being Served?
programme.desc: Niles receives divorce papers from Maris and to show he is not as spineless as people think, he signs them immediately. Later, he begins to regret his impulsiveness and seeks counsel from Martin and Frasier.

programme.title: Frasier: Ask Me No Questions
programme.desc: Niles wonders if he and Maris are meant to be together and he asks Frasier for his opinion. Touched that Niles would ask him such an important question, Frasier ponders the deceptively simple question for days.

programme.title: Frasier: Odd Man Out
programme.desc: Frasier decides to meet a woman who accidentally left a message on his answering machine.

programme.title: Frasier: Frasier's Imaginary Friend
programme.desc: Nobody believes Frasier when he claims to have spent his vacation with a supermodel.

programme.title: Frasier: The Gift Horse
programme.desc: Frasier and Niles compete to buy Martin the best birthday present. Frasier buys a huge TV set, while Niles manages to find Martin's old police horse. After the party, though, Frasier and Niles find Martin pondering the sadness of ageing.

programme.title: Frasier: Halloween
programme.desc: Niles hosts a costume party and Roz tells Frasier that she may be expecting a child.

programme.title: Frasier: The Kid
programme.desc: Roz comes to terms with her impending motherhood and at Frasier's urging, decides to tell the news to the baby's father.

programme.title: Frasier: The 1000th Show
programme.desc: The station manager wants to throw a publicity rally to celebrate Frasier's 1000th show. This soon escalates into 'Frasier Crane Day,' leaving Niles very jealous. There is just one problem: Frasier can't seem to get there in time.

programme.title: Frasier: Voyage of the Damned
programme.desc: Roz gets an offer for a free cruise if Frasier agrees to make a celebrity appearance.

programme.title: Frasier: My Fair Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier has a relationship with a well-known attorney. All is well until his family point out that Frasier is playing out the role of the submissive female in the relationship.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Adult Education
programme.desc: Blanche's psychology professor sexually harasses her when she goes to him for help on a difficult test. Blanche's professor makes her a harassing deal: If she has sex with him, he'll give her an 'A' for the exam.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Job Hunting
programme.desc: When Rose loses her job at the grief center, she begins searching for other sources of work. Meanwhile, Blanche tries to lose a few pounds and Dorothy is excited when a man she once had a crush on asks her out.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Blind Ambitions
programme.desc: Rose's sister, Lily, can't accept the fact that now that she's blind, she needs help.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Big Daddy
programme.desc: Blanche's father, Big Daddy, comes to Miami for a visit, with an announcement; he's sold the family plantation and is setting out to become a country singer.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Way We Met
programme.desc: One night after watching 'Psycho', the girls find it hard to sleep so they stay up and reminisce about how they all came to live with one another.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: End of the Curse
programme.desc: Blanche is mortified after taking a pregnancy test which indicates she's pregnant. Then after visiting her doctor, she learns the truth, she's beginning menopause.

programme.title: Movie: Love at the Shore
programme.desc: A successful and driven single mom plans a working vacation to her parents where she and her kids encounter the next door neighbour, a confident devil-may-care surfer.

programme.title: Movie: My Secret Valentine
programme.desc: A young woman takes advice from the chalkboard notes that her mysterious house rental tenant leaves when a slick sales rep arrives with plans to buy her family prized winery.

programme.title: Movie: My Summer Prince
programme.desc: When a prince finds himself in some hot water for his partying ways, the royal family hires a PR consultant. But when she falls ill, her assistant steps in to take control of the campaign and possibly the prince's heart.

programme.title: Movie: Love in the Sun
programme.desc: A recently engaged woman returns to her hometown where she finds herself falling for another man. She now must decide if she wants to be with her current fiancée, or, if she wants to explore life with her new beau.

programme.title: South Park: Krazy Kripples
programme.desc: Believing that people who are born disabled are better than those who are disabled through an accident, Jimmy and Timmy pull together a group of people like themselves and call their new club the 'Crips.'

programme.title: South Park: The Return of Chef
programme.desc: Stan, Kyle, Kenny and Cartman are thrilled to have their old friend back when the town is jolted by Chef's sudden reappearance. The boys soon notice that Chef is acting different and his strange behaviour begins to get him in serious trouble.

programme.title: South Park: Breast Cancer Show Ever
programme.desc: Wendy gets into trouble when she threatens to beat up Cartman after school is out.

programme.title: South Park: Sexual Harassment Panda
programme.desc: After Sexual Harassment Panda 'educates' the children, Cartman sues Stan for sexual harassment, and a flurry of other lawsuits follow.

programme.title: South Park: Conjoined Fetus Lady
programme.desc: Kyle visits the dreaded school nurse, who suffers from Conjoined Twin Myslexia Disease. His reaction prompts the entire town to rally behind the nurse, singling her out to 'honour' her. Meanwhile, Pip leads the school dodgeball team to the championships.

programme.title: South Park: A Ladder to Heaven
programme.desc: Kenny died with the winning ticket to a prize of endless candy in his pocket. The boys decide to build a ladder to Heaven where they expect to find him and get the ticket back. The Feds think Saddam may be hiding weapons in Heaven and plan to bomb it.

programme.title: South Park: Cat Orgy
programme.desc: While all the adults are gathering at Mr. Mackey's house to watch a meteor shower Shelly Marsh is left baby-sit Cartman. They square off when she invites her much older boyfriend over.

programme.title: South Park: Two Guys Naked in a Hot Tub
programme.desc: Stan's parents drag him along to Mr. Mackey's meteor shower party, where he is sent down into the basement to play with a 'bunch of Melvins.' The ATF believes everyone in the house to be part of a cult, and Stan and the 'Angels' must save the day.

programme.title: South Park: Jewbilee
programme.desc: Kyle invites Kenny to join him and Ike at Jewbilee, a camp for Jewish kids, where they make various arts and crafts as tribute to the great and powerful Moses.

programme.title: South Park: All About the Mormons?
programme.desc: A Mormon kid moves to South Park and it's up to Stan to beat him up. But when Stan and his dad meet their new Mormon neighbours, they become fascinated with how genuinely nice they are.

programme.title: Kevin Hart: Seriously Funny
programme.desc: Kevin's getting older and wiser, and now it's time to get serious, seriously funny, that is.

programme.title: South Park: Freak Strike
programme.desc: When the boys learn that talk shows offer prizes to people who are grossly disfigured they can't sign Butters up fast enough.

programme.title: South Park: Cancelled
programme.desc: Stan, Cartman, Kyle and Kenny find out that planet Earth is just one big intergalactic reality show and it's about to be cancelled.

programme.title: South Park: Erection Day
programme.desc: The South Park Elementary School Talent Show is coming up and Jimmy can't wait to perform his comedy routine. But first he must find a way to gain control of his raging hormones.

programme.title: Movie: The Wrong Crush
programme.desc: A high school student running from her troubled past becomes the target of affection from an unwanted admirer.

programme.title: Movie: The Wrong Cruise
programme.desc: A mother takes her teen daughter on a cruise to bond and the two unexpectedly find themselves falling for couple of very handsome passengers.

programme.title: Movie: The Wrong Roommate
programme.desc: Following a break-up, a college professor agrees to live at her sister's and watch over the home and her teenaged niece. Unbeknownst to her, the guest house is occupied. The mysterious stranger turns out to have a troubled past.

programme.title: Movie: The Wrong Boy Next Door
programme.desc: A troubled teen on house arrest falls for the boy next door, until she becomes convinced there is more to him than meets the eye.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The List Murders
programme.desc: For 18 years, a man who murdered his entire family successfully eluded the FBI. Investigators used art and forensic science to find the killer and bring him to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Raw Terror
programme.desc: The story of Damion Heersink, an eleven-year-old boy who almost died after eating an improperly cooked hamburger teeming with E-Coli, and the people who saved his life.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Window Watcher
programme.desc: Evidence at the scene supported a woman's seemingly farfetched story that a man wearing only underwear and gloves broke into the house, stabbed her boyfriend to death, and raped and terrorized her for hours afterwards.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Stranger in the Night
programme.desc: When his mother is found dead, a Delaware man tells a story so improbable that police don't believe it. While there's no evidence directly tying him to the crime, investigators are certain he knows more than he's saying, until forensic testing is done.

programme.title: Forensic Files: DNA Dragnet
programme.desc: Security camera video shows that what appears to be a casual encounter is actually a forced abduction, leading to murder. The perpetrator’s MO is remarkably similar to another murder which occurred five months earlier only 15 miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smiley Face
programme.desc: A woman is assaulted and stabbed nearly 30 times by an unknown assailant. Within days police hone in on a suspect who all but admits to the crime. As the trial approaches, DNA test results stun prosecutors and the suspect is released.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Home of the Brave
programme.desc: When their trailer catches fire, the young husband heroically rescues his wife and infant son. A month later, his wife is beaten to death in a bedroom of his parents' home. The cut window screen points to an intruder, but there is a lack of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freeze Framed
programme.desc: An apparent suicide turns out to be a much more menacing scenario involving a black widow.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Jim Jones: Unholy Massacre
programme.desc: More than 900 Americans died in an isolated jungle in northern Guyana in November 1978. Jim Jones, has gone down in history as a madman who drove his followers to suicide. But the truth is more complicated and more tragic than that.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Step by Step
programme.desc: A wealthy socialite died after falling down stairs, but was it an accident or was it murder? The laws of physics and an accident reconstructionist provided the answer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Who's Your Daddy
programme.desc: A tiny clue enables police to determine where the victim had been just before she died; it would also lead them to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Without a Prayer
programme.desc: Madalyn Murray O'Hair and her two top lieutenants disappeared with no shortage of suspects. Her abduction may never have been solved if it weren't for the discovery of a headless, handless body, and the serial number on an artificial hip.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pastoral Care
programme.desc: The body of a female prison guard shows up in a landfill and investigators suspect the hundreds of prisoners in the facility where she worked.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Partners in Crime
programme.desc: It takes a long time and a very hot fire to cremate a human body, and thus destroy any evidence of foul play. But the medical examiner who performed the autopsy on the badly burned body of Charles 'Jack' Lynch found telltale clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: For Love or Money
programme.desc: A wealthy man goes missing, and leaves behind instructions in his will regarding what should be done if he died of violent circumstances, leading to believe he was aware his life was in danger.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Stick 'em Up
programme.desc: When a bank president is found floating in a nearby lake, taped to a chair, forensic experts start piecing together the tape and discover a missing piece. It's this piece, and tips pouring in from residents, that will lead to a capture.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Brew
programme.desc: When the head of the Coors Brewing Company is kidnapped and held for ransom, it kicked off one of the most intense manhunts in American history. See how forensic science helped track down the kidnappers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Mistaken for Dead
programme.desc: A man dies unexpectedly in a doctor's office and the investigation is surprising.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Stake-Out
programme.desc: When a banker's wife is kidnapped, officers scour the bank, and records for clues. They soon realize how much evidence can be found around a normal office.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Jim Jones: Unholy Massacre
programme.desc: More than 900 Americans died in an isolated jungle in northern Guyana in November 1978. Jim Jones, has gone down in history as a madman who drove his followers to suicide. But the truth is more complicated and more tragic than that.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Best Foot Forward
programme.desc: A young woman goes missing, but will anyone notice? A business tycoon caught in a scandal he works over-time not to expose.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Purebread Murder
programme.desc: A young mother is murdered after years of domestic abuse. There are clues at the scene: bloody footprints and DNA from the victim's rape kit. But the evidence which will conclusively tie the killer to the crime is on a freshly baked hamburger bun.

programme.title: HLN Weekend Express
programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.title: HLN Weekend Express
programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.title: HLN Weekend Express
programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.title: HLN Weekend Express

programme.title: HLN Weekend Express
programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Finger Pane
programme.desc: Texas City police fear the work of a serial killer after two young women are found dead in the same field. They have little to go on until a third woman comes forward claiming she's the one who got away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Good as Gold
programme.desc: Two young women are killed by a mysterious intruder. Investigators hope that his unusual brand of cigarettes and new advances in DNA technology can paint a picture of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherly Love
programme.desc: A young man devotes his life to law enforcement after his sister is brutally murdered. In the end, a brother's love - and a new scientific tool - unlocks the mystery behind an age old case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Disrobed
programme.desc: A married couple was found shot to death in their suburban home. Investigators thought they had pin-pointed the killer and his motive until trash revealed the shocking truth and the true killer's identity.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Evidence
programme.desc: The shooting of a man during a hunting trip is reopened years after the incident, and the victim's hunting partner becomes a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Formula
programme.desc: The mother of a suspiciously murdered four-month-old was convicted, but an explanation for the death would come five months later from the most unlikely of sources: his newborn brother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hear No Evil
programme.desc: Threatening emails, a missing person and an abandoned truck lead police to a home where they believe a murder was committed. The evidence is overwhelming and investigators are sure they have the killer. What they don't have is the body of the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The Kristine Fitzhugh Case - A woman is found dead in her home and it seems like an accidental fall down the stairs is to blame. When a pathologist discovers the death was no accident, police suspect it may have been a burglary gone wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Speck of Evidence
programme.desc: On September 17, 1984, in a suburb of Tucson, Arizona, eight-year-old Vicki Hoskins left home on her pink bicycle to mail a letter for her mother. She never returned.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Broken Bond
programme.desc: The story of nurse Tanya Reid who may have murdered her own baby and was planning to murder her son.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: The Gold, The Bad, and The Ugly
programme.desc: Shawn's rocky pay-streak takes him for a wild ride. Kris raids another claim but a rival dredge fights back. Vernon loses patience with his crew's performance. Ken tests a new operator to keep running around the clock.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Dredge Men Tell No Tales
programme.desc: With a massive storm about to hit Nome, Shawn and Ken push their operations to the brink to get one last score in. Emily gambles on untested ground. Kris battles bad attitudes. One dredge pushes too far into the storm, forcing its crew to abandon ship.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Dredged Up: Dive Hard With a Vengeance
programme.desc: With added scenes and facts: Ken learns the Myrtle Irene's fate after a bad storm, and Shawn uses a new tool to find hotspots. Meanwhile, Emily brings on a new crew member, Vernon tries his luck at river mining and Kris gambles with his season.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Gold Is Thicker Than Blood
programme.desc: Shawn confronts his dad for the sake of the family operation. Emily brings her father aboard The Eroica. When Vernon loses a diver, he turns to an unlikely replacement: his daughter Elaine.

programme.title: Dino Hunters: Million-Dollar Dino
programme.desc: Clayton Phipps continues his excavation of a rare, carnivorous dinosaur on his Montana ranch. In Wyoming, Mike Harris and son Jake prepare to sell their prized T-Rex fossil. Aaron Bolan hunts for an Ankylosaurus.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Winter's Fury
programme.desc: Marty, Matt and Misty Raney help the Russell family struggling on a failing homestead in the forests of Pennsylvania. During the biggest storm of the century, the family faces a food shortage with no hunting skills and a cabin on the brink of collapse.

programme.title: Dino Hunters: Dinosaur Cowboys
programme.desc: On the series premiere of Dino Hunters, dinosaur fossil season has begun and Montana rancher Clayton Phipps finds what might be an extremely rare and valuable fossil on his family's property. In Wyoming, Mike Harris and his son uncover a triceratops horn.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Gold Is Thicker Than Blood
programme.desc: Shawn confronts his dad for the sake of the family operation. Emily brings her father aboard The Eroica. When Vernon loses a diver, he turns to an unlikely replacement: his daughter Elaine.

programme.title: Dino Hunters: Million-Dollar Dino
programme.desc: Clayton Phipps continues his excavation of a rare, carnivorous dinosaur on his Montana ranch. In Wyoming, Mike Harris and son Jake prepare to sell their prized T-Rex fossil. Aaron Bolan hunts for an Ankylosaurus.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Savage Wilderness
programme.desc: The Raneys explore their most epic rescues, counting down to the five most hostile and dangerous states that present the most grueling challenges for new homesteaders.

programme.title: Dino Hunters: Dinosaur Cowboys
programme.desc: On the series premiere of Dino Hunters, dinosaur fossil season has begun and Montana rancher Clayton Phipps finds what might be an extremely rare and valuable fossil on his family's property. In Wyoming, Mike Harris and his son uncover a triceratops horn.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Gold Strike
programme.desc: The crew cleans up and does a final gold weigh-in for the season. Then Dustin leads them to a new mine site he's had his eye on that proves instantly to have massive gold potential.

programme.title: The Super Retriever Series Crown Championship: Open Finals - 3
programme.desc: The best retrievers in the world competition in hunting are featured.

programme.title: The Scott Martin Challenge: The Biggest Challenge Yet
programme.desc: Scott goes to Freeman Boatworks to unveil his newest addition to the show, the 42' Freeman. He sets out to break her in the right way.

programme.title: The Direction: Farm Pond 101
programme.desc: Mark Stow, Ryan white and his sons fish in Kentucky.

programme.title: Sport Fishing Television: Southern Brotherhood
programme.desc: Hunt redfish, triggerfish and cobia with Redfin Charters in Charleston, South Carolina.

programme.title: Auction Kings: Ms. Pac-Man Arcade Game/ Military Short Sword
programme.desc: Paul challenges the crew to a friendly round of Ms. Pac-man. Gallery 63 auction off a military short sword and an Art Nouveau bronze statue.

programme.title: Uncharted Waters with Peter Miller: Dominican Republic Marlin Mahi and Tuna
programme.desc: In Cap Cana, Peter fishes for blue marlin, mahi and tuna, and plays some golf.

programme.title: The Super Retriever Series Crown Championship: Open Finals - 4
programme.desc: The best retrievers in the world competition in hunting are featured.

programme.title: Chasin' the Sun: Bloopers and Outtakes
programme.desc: Bloopers and outtakes with things we've seen on the water but never before shown.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Killzone
programme.desc: Marty helps homesteaders in Oregon build a barn; Misty creates a subterranean garden; Matt finds a human approach to a mysterious predator threat.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Under Siege
programme.desc: The Raneys attempt to help the Zabec family in Virginia. With pigs destroying the homestead, predators killing livestock and a huge oak threatening their cabin, the Raneys must convince them that their free-range dream is killing their homestead.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Trapped
programme.desc: An isolated road becomes a death trap when a medical emergency strikes a secluded homestead. The Raneys face their first ever failed rescue.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Fire and Ice
programme.desc: The Raneys make a self-automated homestead to function while firefighters Kim and Casey Boespflug are away on duty.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Shock and Awe
programme.desc: Marty tackles an off-grid hydropower system. Matt creates a meat smoker. One of the Raneys is injured in a surprise accident.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Homestead of Horrors
programme.desc: A nightmare in North Carolina. A couple that is terrified to hunt and a ramshackle home with exposed wires in the shower and chickens in the living room. The Raneys have never seen a homestead like this.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Poisoned
programme.desc: The Raneys build the Rains a hillside garden, turn a cave into a goat fortress, and find uncontaminated water.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Trust or Die
programme.desc: The Deeters are dog-mushers with a homestead on the edge of disaster. Bears dine on the dog food and the forest around them is a deadly tinder box. The Raneys must push them to make drastic changes, but discover the Deeters don't trust outsiders.

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: Rotting Dresses and Candy Messes
programme.desc: Gypsy teen Maquayla can't wait to wear her dream wedding gown, but disaster strikes when a dead dress arrives for her big day! Mom plans to use Yazzie's Sweet 16 party to marry her off, but it's all-out war when her gorger boyfriend makes an appearance.

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: My Daughter's Not Marrying a Jailbird
programme.desc: Jett and Bubba are in a rush to wed before his jail sentence, but Jett's mom Angie has plans to stop the union. Gypsy mother Mona Lisa is throwing her daughter a coming-of-age party, but first, Mona Lisa Jr. needs to reclaim her self-confidence.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: My Life in 7 Suitcases
programme.desc: Ari leaves her life behind to be with Biniyam in Ethiopia, but her mom has standards. Jenny is shocked when she arrives at her new home in India. Chaos erupts when Brittany arrives in Jordan. Jihoon reveals he is keeping another secret from Deavan.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Sleepover Nightmare
programme.desc: A young boy at a sleepover party mysteriously loses control over his arms and legs; a woman is shot in the leg at her own bachelorette party, but claims not to know who did it; bubbles in a woman's arteries are causing a stroke.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Drama Mama
programme.desc: The real reason behind a teenager's bulging tummy and stomach pains shocks nurses, doctors and even her meddling mom. A delirious man yelling for his 'car' reveals clues about his own attempted murder, and a college co-ed mysteriously stops breathing.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Raining Cats and Dogs
programme.desc: A patient's pet causes pandemonium in the ER; a man experiences paralysis that climbs up his legs to his chest until he can no longer breathe, a war veteran suffers from phantom pain in his amputated hand.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Escaping Diagnosis
programme.desc: A disoriented young woman in a bunny costume lands in the ER on April Fool's Day. A doctor treats a patient whose severed thumb needs reattachment, but can't treat another patient's less severe cut.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Turtle Trouble
programme.desc: A man has a snapping turtle clamped to his neck, and it will not let go. As a hurricane closes in, an ER doctor rushes to get all the patients out. A man is impaled by a chainsaw while trimming trees twenty feet high.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Hiccup Circus
programme.desc: A circus sword-swallower suffers from a persistent case of hiccups. A mother and daughter mysteriously collapse in the ER, for completely different reasons. A woman loses control of her legs at her daughter's graduation.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Bit By a Boa
programme.desc: A boa constrictor has wrapped around a man's arm and won't let go; a young woman has a severe laceration but doctors begin to suspect there may be more to her case than the injury, a young man goes into anaphylactic shock after a dinner out.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Heeled!
programme.desc: A man is impaled in his abdomen by a stiletto heel. A seemingly healthy outdoorsman has a series of seizures that baffle his doctors. Two patients make their doctor suspicious when they both complain about identical headaches that started during sex.

programme.title: Friends: The One in Vegas

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Atlantis SquarePants

programme.title: Storage Wars: Here's Lookin' At You, Kenny

programme.title: Storage Wars: Mr. Nezhoda's Opus

programme.title: Storage Wars: What Came First: The Chicken or the Auction?

programme.title: Flipping Vegas: Renters From Hell
programme.desc: Scott buys a house that was home to over a dozen tenants who kept the house in such poor condition that some of its peskier inhabitants still remain.

programme.title: Flipping Vegas: Ugly Coyote House
programme.desc: When Scott purchases an abandoned house on the outskirts of Vegas, his crew must fight off some very unwelcome houseguests.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping: The Waterlogged Cabin
programme.desc: A 'lurker' Zombie seems great initially, but has a lot of water damage under the surface. The team must battle against continuous rainfall in order to ensure their upgrades don't get washed away, which means a major revamp of the roof.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping: The Market Booster
programme.desc: A ratty house with a goofy layout has Keith fearing it's a trap. But the team thinks the real payout on this flip will be how it increases market value to the neighborhood, where other zombies reside.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Hook, Line, and Sucker
programme.desc: The buyers head west to Inglewood, Calif. It's Nabila Haniss' neck of the woods, but what she finds could end up shooting blanks. Darrell Sheets' bravado is on display, and not much else.

programme.title: Storage Wars: The Monster Hash
programme.desc: The buyers encounter new auctioneers in Costa Mesa, Calif. Darrell defends his turf, and things get a little monstrous. Ivy Calvin finds a tool he's never seen before.

programme.title: Movie: The Expendables 3
programme.desc: The mercenary team is back to do battle against its leader Barney Ross' one-time friend and Expendables co-founder, who became a cold-blooded arms dealer. Ross recruits a new generation of younger, tech-savvy teammates to help take him down.

programme.title: Movie: The Expendables
programme.desc: A group of highly skilled mercenaries travel to South America to overthrow the dictator of a small island. After they arrive the team is challenged by local rebels.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Chairman
programme.desc: The guys shock their fellow shoppers by going footloose and fancy free in a discount store, then pose insane questions to strangers in the park. Tonight's loser is taken for the ride of his life in a tricked out wheelchair he can't possibly control.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Scarytales
programme.desc: The guys are forced to look for love in all the wrong places at a singles' event, and then phone it in making embarrassing calls on strangers' cells.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Vampire Weakened
programme.desc: The guys act frosty while working the ice cream counter, then take Joe's dogs for a romp in the park with help from some strangers. Later, tonight's loser watches his blood boil while performing with a gospel choir.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stare Master
programme.desc: The guys play a game of copycat at the park while babysitting kids, and then hit the supermarket for a game of catch and release.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hitting the Wrong Note
programme.desc: The guys dress to the nines, but act like zeroes while trying to get sympathy, and tonight's big loser faces the music in a tone-deaf punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Medium, Well Done
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q, and Joe pose as TV execs pitching insane shows, and tonight's big loser undergoes a psychic reading that puts his real life on the wrong track.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Butt of the Joker
programme.desc: The guys pair up in focus group presentations, and tonight's loser tries to cure the public of a nasty habit, but gets people smoking mad.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Junk in the Trunk
programme.desc: Find out which two Jokers know how to practice transcendental meditation and which boy band member the guys met at Carnegie Deli.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Up Loser's Creek
programme.desc: Find out which joker ran for Congress as a write-in candidate, which joker was a top-notch salesman before starting the show and who had a job in finance.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Flatfoot the Pirate
programme.desc: Who made the call to give Murr a face full of slushie at the mall? How did the Jokers keep their props secret from each other before Laugh Man Standing? And whose breast milk did Pirate Sal chug?

programme.title: Movie: Austin Powers: International Man of Mystery
programme.desc: A secret agent from the 1960s is brought out of cryofreeze to take on his nemesis in the '90s.

programme.title: Movie: Austin Powers: The Spy Who Shagged Me
programme.desc: A groovy spy travels back in time to stop his arch nemesis from taking over the world.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 4
programme.desc: You're cordially invited to a one-of-a-kind dinner party at Joe, Q, Murr, and Sal's homes from the comfort of your own.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Show Party 3
programme.desc: Join the guys as they do what they do best: talk with their mouths full. The boys will surely be eating a well-balanced meal and dishing out what they've been up to at home.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 2
programme.desc: Take a seat at the table as the guys dish out what they've been up to this week at home. Get a glimpse of how the guys really hang out and, after some grub, they'll battle it out over who will be hosting next week's meal.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 1
programme.desc: Be a guest at a dinner party with the stars of the show. Join Sal, Joe, Q and Murr aka 'The Tenderloins,' as they dish about their week, their friendship and whatever else is thrown on their dinner table.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Saddam Jose
programme.desc: Comedians bring their hilarious personal stories to life with a reinvention of stand-up.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Stankin' Up the Joint
programme.desc: Someone has an odd prayer for Yamaneika, Matteo Lane has a hilarious blind date in Italy, and Ronnie Jordan has some tips for the single women at the office. Plus, Corey Rodrigues knows the importance of sunblock at the beach.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Fingering the Man
programme.desc: Molly Austin takes a bachelorette party to the next level, and Jonathan Martin's parents give new meaning to the word 'cheap'. Plus, if you thought your family was embarrassing, Rachel Feinstein's might have them beat.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Pumpkin Spice Bride
programme.desc: Comedian Corey Rodrigues' mind is playing tricks on him, Calvin Evans gives up his seat on the bus (then asks for it back), and the hilarious Yamaneika is a maid with no honor at her friend's pumpkin spice-themed wedding.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Having a Baby
programme.desc: Adam dispels the myth about getting pregnant after 35, delves into breastfeeding vs. formula, and explores postpartum depression for women, and men.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Weight Loss
programme.desc: Adam illustrates all the reasons low-fat diets can actually make you fatter, and why counting calories is a waste of time.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins the Hospital
programme.desc: Inflated hospital costs have created an unfair system, reckless antibiotic prescriptions makes them worthless, and you might not need a mammogram.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Art
programme.desc: Adam poses the question of what makes great art and shows why pieces visible to the masses are revered, regardless of artistic merit. He exposes the masters as copycats, and reveals that today's art market is a moneymaking scheme.

programme.title: Hack My Life: Inside Hacks: Dr. Hack to the Rescue
programme.desc: What do Beyonce and Brooke have in common? And was the first sports bra really made from two jock straps?

programme.title: Hack My Life: Inside Hacks: Hacks for Work and Play
programme.desc: Was basketball created from a hack? And which explosive hack gave Brooke nightmares?

programme.title: Hack My Life: Inside Hacks: Slacker vs. Hacker
programme.desc: Find out the best way to get likes on a dating app and see how much fun Brooke and Kevin had while using duct tape to wax.

programme.title: Hack My Life: Inside Hacks: Cookin' Up Some Hacks
programme.desc: Brooke and Kevin take hacking to the next level as they uncover the best hacks for cooking pizza and cutting cake. Plus, they’ll show you why bread is a true all-star, and teach some hacks that every parent needs to know.

programme.title: Movie: Austin Powers: International Man of Mystery
programme.desc: A secret agent from the 1960s is brought out of cryofreeze to take on his nemesis in the '90s.

programme.title: Almost Genius: Falling Short
programme.desc: Chris and April love those who have a recipe for success but are missing a few ingredients. Tonight, they serve up a piping hot bowl of humble soup.

programme.title: Almost Genius: No Cigar
programme.desc: From a dad with a DIY rollercoaster, to the world's smallest gymnast, this show highlights those brave souls who think on their feet but don’t always land on them.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Lipstick and the Flying Nun
programme.desc: While working at an antique shop, Michael unpacks an item with a message from beyond. Plus, he works a fundraiser where a painting raises not only money but the body of a nun.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Moving Dragon
programme.desc: While working at a pool store, Michael flies on a kickboard. Then, at a pet store, he breeds hamsters from pellets. He also stuns his helper on moving day with a fiery statue.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Cat Lady
programme.desc: At auditions, Michael wows directors with costume changes but cracks when he sings. Plus, things get sticky when he demos flying post-its. Then, Michael's co-worker's jaw drops when a shape-shifting tenant returns while they clean house.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Vanishing Daycare
programme.desc: Michael transforms a t-shirt at a thrift store, and his aid at a daycare thinks she loses more than her mind. Plus, Michael's helper at a museum runs scared when a sculpture slithers away.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Wrapper's Delight
programme.desc: The guys make a mockery of each other while acting as restaurant managers, sing along with strangers trying to name that (made up) tune. The loser gets wrapped up in a birthday surprise that definitely wasn't on his wish list.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Fe-mail
programme.desc: The Joker that absolutely hates massages; and the length of time it took the make-up team to get Joe all doled up for his debut as a female techie.

programme.title: At Home With Amy Sedaris: First Dates
programme.desc: Amy shows us how to prepare for a first date, by preparing for a first date. Amy prepares a meal, crafts a special gift and enlists Chassie for a makeover. She also talks flower arrangements with Patty Hogg.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stripped of Dignity
programme.desc: The guys get a taste of babysitting while asking reluctant strangers to watch their kid, then head to the grocery store to conduct taste(less) tests with shoppers, and tonight's loser is forced to strip for the wrong people.

programme.desc: Taking viewers to the best racetracks across America for great racing action. TVG's exclusive tracks are highlighted in addition to expert analysis and information provided by hosts and analysts live from the track and our Los Angeles studios.

programme.title: Book TV
programme.desc: A focus on non-fiction books, authors and the publishing industry, offering viewers a forum to hear from their favourite authors.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Whale of a Time
programme.desc: An unexpected visit from a beautiful former co-worker visits Ed whose mere presence puts everyone's lives in serious danger. Danny and Mike have to protect this woman with the mysterious background. Delinda and Nessa compete for a high roller's affection.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Can You See What I See?
programme.desc: Ed decides to shake things up at the casino by switching everyone's job positions around.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Tainted Love
programme.desc: Ed has jury duty on Valentine's Day, but Jillian thinks he is purposely avoiding her.

programme.title: Las Vegas: To Protect and Serve Manicotti
programme.desc: Danny and Mike feverishly work to reclaim $100,000 stolen from the casino.

programme.title: Las Vegas: One Nation, Under Surveillance
programme.desc: An ex-Marine turned local politician is embroiled in a sordid scandal with a 16-year-old.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Hit Me
programme.desc: When surveillance technology fails to catch a thief, Ed must rely on human ingenuity.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Hide and Sneak
programme.desc: A high-rolling vampire mysteriously shows up in Sam's room and tries to seduce her.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Letters, Lawyer, and Loose Women
programme.desc: Mike agrees to help a hotel guest who has lost his wedding ring at a local brothel.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Magic Carpet Fred
programme.desc: A beguiling magician uses his skills to help Ed catch a slippery thief.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Centennial
programme.desc: The new owner of the Montecito will be making some changes to the personnel and property.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Viva Las Vegas
programme.desc: Ed worries that the revamped Montecito will not be ready in time for the reopening.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Fake the Money and Run
programme.desc: Ed desperately tries to keep tough new boss Monica out of the loop until he finds out who's been making counterfeit chips that could flood the casino while Danny's accountant suggests that he sell his late father's house and refers him to a realtor.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Double Down, Triple Threat
programme.desc: Danny is reunited with Dr. Jordan Cavanaugh on a quest to solve a kidnapping scheme.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Whatever Happened to Seymour Magoon?
programme.desc: Jillian sprains her ankle and convinces Ed to present their family dog at the Nevada State Dog Show. Monica buys an 80-year-old woman's house to build a golf course but things get complicated when a demolition crew uncovers a skeleton.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Big Ed De-Cline
programme.desc: Ed is told to relax but he soon finds out that he has become the victim of identity theft.

programme.title: Las Vegas: The Real Mccoy
programme.desc: Danny tracks down the identity of the mystery woman who appears in photos with his father and, despite warnings from Mike and Mary, he offers to give her money for an outstanding medical expense. Later, Danny becomes suspicious of his new flame, Penny.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Everything Old Is You Again
programme.desc: When Danny visits an antique fair at the Montecito he becomes the focus of a flash back to the Jubilee Hotel and Casino circa 1962 where he is the director of entertainment.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Bold, Beautiful and Blue
programme.desc: Danny, Monica and FBI Agent Portis review the security measures taken to protect the Kashmir Sapphire, a priceless gemstone on loan and display at the Montecito, from theft. Meanwhile, Monica tries to lure Ed back to the Montecito with lavish gifts.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Mothwoman
programme.desc: The Montecito hosts a comic book convention and Monica questions Danny's decision to have it at the hotel, after she's mistaken for Mothwoman by the comic book fans. Meanwhile, Sam runs into an old nemesis at a funeral and sparks fly.

programme.title: Las Vegas: For Sail by Owner
programme.desc: A hostile takeover of the Montecito casino is thwarted by a stunning change of events. Mike is mugged by a thug, leaving Danny to seek revenge. Meanwhile, Delinda is smitten by a blind man who keeps his real life a secret from her.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Down and Dirty
programme.desc: When a televised national poker tour comes to the Montecito, Danny and Mike investigate their hunch that someone is cheating. Elsewhere, Sam battles with Casey over their divorce settlement, and demands half ownership of the casino.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Bait and Switch
programme.desc: When diamonds are stolen from the Montecito pool taping of a Fat Joe music video, Danny and Ed rely on amateur sex video footage to track down the thief. Elsewhere, Sam and Mary set out to reveal Mike's secret as a male stripper named Hot Chocolate.

programme.title: Las Vegas: The Bitch Is Back
programme.desc: The Montecito prepares for the opening of Wolfgang Puck's seventh Vegas restaurant. Elsewhere, hotel guests become frightened when they begin to have ghostly encounters. Sam wagers a bet with her nemesis to see who is the best host in Vegas.

programme.title: Las Vegas: And Here's Mike With the Weather
programme.desc: Ed and Danny try to track down $2.9 million worth of irregularities in the Montecito's books. Meanwhile, Danny's former marine sergeant visits and Danny offers him a job at the casino. Elsewhere, Mike gets to fulfill his dream of reporting the weather.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Urban Legends
programme.desc: The Montecito hosts a car show and NASCAR driver Jimmie Johnson comes to Las Vegas to act as a celebrity judge. Meanwhile, an urban legend comes to life when Danny and Mike discover a man with a missing kidney lying in a bathtub full of ice.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Big Time Flavour
programme.desc: Guy's looking for plates packing a punch. He tries a unique version of pizza that involves jam as well as an oxtail stew.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Piling on the Pork
programme.desc: Guy is digging in and pigging out on this trip starting with a Puerto Rican spot in San Antonio that's building a unique take on nachos and cooking up a monster chop. In New Orleans, a gangster grill serves up pork knuckles and some sweet bird.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sicilian and Seafood
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's going from incredible Italian to sensational seafood. In Oklahoma City, a funky food truck putting out wood-fired pizza and grandma's Sicilian meatball recipe.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Meatballs To Lollipops
programme.desc: In Miami, Florida, the local watering hole putting' a unique spin on standard bar food with the loaded chimi burrito and lobster lollipops.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Burgers, Noodles and Quahogs
programme.desc: A Somerville, Mass. burger joint's mac and cheese burger; chorizo-stuffed quahogs.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Savory Sensations
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's warming up with some standout specialties. In Brooklyn, N.Y., the mom and pop diner flipping a skillet apple waffle with pancetta and deep-frying breakfast empanadas.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Places You Sent Me
programme.desc: Viewer recommended spots including In Salt Lake City, a 79-year-old diner serving Mile High biscuits and gravy; in New Orleans, a neighbourhood dive puttin' out roast beef po' boys; in Middletown, Conn., a historic dinner that was rebuilt after a fire.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: All Kinds of Barbecue
programme.desc: Guy checks out BBQ in New Orleans, San Antonio and Mississippi.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: East Coast Eatin'
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri checks in on some favorite East Coast eats. His first stop is a neighborhood joint that's still dishin' out diner classics from a cramped kitchen.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: A World of Flavors
programme.desc: Guy Fieri tracks down great tastes from all over the world. He tastes foods ranging from Mexican to Greek.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Bar Food
programme.desc: Guy visits Alamaba for homemade gumbo and a super spicy crawfish boil.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Old Time Favorites
programme.desc: Guy checks out places that are keeping the past alive. In Idaho, a landmark is serving up big plates, in Portland an old school lunch counter offers grilled cheese and in Miami, a family cooks up seafood like they did in Cuba.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Where the Locals Go
programme.desc: Guy Fieri finds local favourites from a third generation cafeteria outside Atlanta.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Comfort Cookin'
programme.desc: Guy visits places where comfort food is done their own way. In Arizona, a Paris-trained chef prepares ham steak with red eye gravy, and a pastry chef in San Francisco has folks lining up for chili cheddar cornbread.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: East Coast Eatin'
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri checks in on some favorite East Coast eats. His first stop is a neighborhood joint that's still dishin' out diner classics from a cramped kitchen.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Asia, Africa And India
programme.desc: Guy's going international with flavors from Asia, Africa and India. In Los Angeles, a funky fast Filipino joint spicin' up house-made hot dogs and piling pork adobo onto grilled cheese.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Comfort and Soul
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's hittin' up some joints that'll warm the palate and the soul. In Portland, Ore., a funky neighbourhood cafe is cranking out comfort foods like the heartless artichoke sandwich and a curried lentil dish that hits all the right notes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Timeless Traditions
programme.desc: This trip, Guy gets the lowdown on some longstanding traditions. In Philadelphia, the Jamaican joint going all out authentic with the jerk chicken.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Real Deal Roots
programme.desc: Guy digs into dishes with a personal connection, including a Jewish deli in Toronto.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Wings 'n' Things
programme.desc: Ain't no thing but a chicken wing in Coeur d'Alene, Idaho, when Guy Fieri stops by to taste a couple of new eats they've added. A Nashville barbecue spot has a new take on the old standard wings.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Burgers, Burritos and Biscuits
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's checking out all kinds of food across Flavortown. In Boulder City, Nevada, a chili-churning diner is keeping it all in the family. An old-school breakfast spot has gone big with four locations around Arizona.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Poke, Pork and Chicken Parm
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's checking in on some of his favourite joints serving up a bite for any time of day. In Chicago, things have changed a lot for Guy's poke buddies. In Denver, a triple threat is adding some new biscuit sandwiches and late-night Italian options.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Italian, Thai and Pie
programme.desc: Guy Fieri has a righteous time revisiting joints offering everything from pie to Thai. In Honolulu, a family spot going strong with their specialties straight out of Thailand.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: From Near to Far
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's taking a trip around the world without leaving the U.S. An Italian eatery in Boston is still serving up real-deal dishes from the homeland.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: 30 Minute Meals: Trendy Fried Chicken
programme.desc: Rachael uses a Korean-inspired batter and slaw to shake up the traditional fried chicken game. Vodka and corn-starch in the batter are the secret to light and crispy skin on Korean fried chicken and her kimchi slaw puts a spin on cabbage slaw.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: The Bertinelli Boys Are Back in Town
programme.desc: Valerie is refreshing classic diner fare in a meal for her brothers, David and Patrick, and her nephew, Enzo.

programme.title: The Kitchen: No Sweat Summer Party
programme.desc: Summer party season is heating up and the Kitchen is ready with easy entertaining recipes and ideas. Katie Lee gives turkey a summer makeover with her citrus grilled turkey breast with pineapple marmalade and Jeff Mauro makes sweet potato salad.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Camp Trisha
programme.desc: Trisha has always wanted to go camping with her glam squad, but the great outdoors can sometimes be not-so-great. Instead, she has invited them to Camp Trisha in her own backyard, with notched up versions of campfire favorites including Filet Mignon.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Entertaining the Girls
programme.desc: Molly Yeh's girlfriends are coming over for dinner so she's preparing her go-to special menu. There's going to be make-ahead sticky rhubarb short ribs, a show-stopping crispy saffron rice dish and a fresh side of green beans with potato chip crunch.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: A former city girl, her hunky rancher husband, kids, cowboys and wild mustangs.

programme.title: Grill Power: Steak and Cake
programme.desc: Susie Bulloch's daughter is turning 11 years old, and the family is celebrating with a tradition they call steak and cake: they put the birthday candle in the steak, not the cake.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Family Style: Summertime Faves With a Twist
programme.desc: The hosts share favourite summer recipes with a delicious twist. Jeff makes a boneless riburger and Sunny shares an easy grilled garden state salad. Geoffrey makes his summertime seafood stable fish and chips with spicy tartar sauce.

programme.title: Giada at Home: Pizza and Pasta 101
programme.desc: Giada De Laurentiis and her daughter, Jade, love nothing more than a day at home making pizza and pasta. Together they make a Chicago-style deep dish cheese pizza plus summery spaghetti with lemon zucchini and lemon strawberry sundaes for dessert.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Only Oranges
programme.desc: It's all about oranges, the magic factor in some of Ina's favourite recipes.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Grocery Rush
programme.desc: Guy gives the chefs three turbo-charged games with only 15-20 minutes to shop, cook and plate, making breakfast, lunch and dinner over three short rounds.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives Tournament: GGG Super Teams Part 1
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's worlds collide as 18 chefs from Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives and Guy's Grocery Games who have won GGG on their own combine forces to create nine Super Teams.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives Tournament: GGG Super Teams Part 2
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's two worlds continue to collide as six more chefs from Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives and Guy's Grocery Games chefs pair up to create talented Super Teams. Guy brings back his DDD Dish Wheel and GGG Game Wheel, plus a never-before-seen 'Wheel-y'.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives Tournament: GGG Super Teams Part 3
programme.desc: Guy Fieri doesn't let up on the final three pairs of Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives and Guy's Grocery Games Super Teams. He spins his DDD Dish Wheel and GGG Game Wheel to nail down all the variables for the competition.
