programme.title: River Monsters: Silent Assassin
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade travels to the Paran River in the remote corner of Argentina to investigate the death of a young girl. This creature is not armed with bone crunching jaws or razor sharp teeth, but a razor-sharp blade tipped with tissue destroying venom.

programme.title: River Monsters: Russian Killer
programme.desc: Extreme angler Jeremy Wade heads to Russia's remote Amur River, where the mysterious deaths of three men appear to be linked with a reclusive freshwater giant.

programme.title: River Monsters: Phantom Assassin
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade explores the roots of fishing in Africa's Rift Valley and the monsters the first fishermen faced. It's a dangerous place filled with killer crocs, hippos and warring gangs, but at its heart is a worthy prize: the Nile perch.

programme.title: River Monsters: Deadliest Man-Eaters: Devil Fish Beneath the River
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade is searching for two river monsters tormenting both man and animal. In Texas, he discovers the vicious alligator gar responsible for brutal attacks, and has a chance for a rematch against a bone-crushing Arapaima wreaking havoc in the Amazon.

programme.title: River Monsters: Rapids
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade travels the globe in search of some mysterious, freshwater creatures.

programme.title: River Monsters: Atomic Assassin
programme.desc: An extreme angler is on the trail of a monster that leads him to the site of the worst nuclear accident in history, Chernobyl.

programme.title: River Monsters: Bone Crusher
programme.desc: Jeremy is on the trail of a new river monster after a corpse is found with highly unusual injuries. He also uncovers a spate of disappearances and a mysterious creature patrolling the water.

programme.title: River Monsters: Deadliest Man-Eaters: Devil Fish Beneath the River
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade is searching for two river monsters tormenting both man and animal. In Texas, he discovers the vicious alligator gar responsible for brutal attacks, and has a chance for a rematch against a bone-crushing Arapaima wreaking havoc in the Amazon.

programme.title: River Monsters: Hidden Predator
programme.desc: The biggest bull shark ever recorded was caught in South Africa, in a river. Could this monstrous freshwater catch be a fluke, or are there more shark giants prowling this river. Jeremy Wade heads to South Africa to see if he can land a monster.

programme.title: River Monsters: Alaskan Horror
programme.desc: Wade seeks a dangerous lake monster from native legends.

programme.title: River Monsters: Cold Blooded Horror
programme.desc: The River Monsters in Japan are like no others Jeremy has ever encountered, from the devastating earthquake-causing catfish, the Namazu, to the sinister, child-snatching killer called the Kappa.

programme.title: River Monsters: Chainsaw Predator
programme.desc: Angler Jeremy Wade heads to a remote river in the Australian outback to try and catch the rare but fearsome freshwater sawfish.

programme.title: The Zoo: Birds and the Bees
programme.desc: Leo, a snow leopard rescued from Pakistan, is having trouble eating because of a broken canine. The bird department works feverishly to restore a beehive for the bee-eater birds. Ambassador Center staff work with an adorable fennec fox named Charlie.

programme.title: The Zoo: The Great Turtle Comeback
programme.desc: A charismatic ostrich named Olga works to be reunited with her flock. Buster the squirrel monkey is introduced to the zoo's troop of feisty females. A functionally extinct species of turtle finds new life, and everyone's favorite warthog is back.

programme.title: The Zoo: A New Beginning
programme.desc: Max the camel faces new challenges as he ages. The zoo prepares to give an injured turkey vulture a permanent home, but after healing, there may be a change of plan. Willow the red panda gives birth to two baby cubs.

programme.title: The Zoo: Tiger's Day at the Dentist
programme.desc: The staff is hopeful for a successful breeding season when Mshango the giraffe meets the females of the herd. Power tools are needed for an Amur tiger's root canal, while Louie the swan falls ill, jeopardizing his release.

programme.title: The Zoo: Beloved Bugs
programme.desc: The zoo anxiously awaits the arrival of a snow leopard called K2's fourth cub. The staff is pleased when a pair of Andean condors embrace their new enclosure, while a squirmy binturong fights his annual vaccination.

programme.title: The Zoo: Wallaby in the City
programme.desc: A rowdy, young markhor is injured and vets must treat his infected hoof. The TAB staff head to Manhattan to rescue a wallaby living in an apartment, while a fruit bat discovers how to spread her wings, and a trio of alligators move into their summer home.

programme.title: The Zoo: Cougar Cub Rescue
programme.desc: A trio of abandoned puma cubs arrives at the zoo, while the staff grows concerned that Ella, the oldest rhino, is not acting herself. Meanwhile, a Caribbean flamingo is born at the zoo after nearly two decades, and Otto the stallion makes his debut.

programme.title: The Zoo: Velcro the Incredible
programme.desc: An okapi called Magani is ready to breed and is paired with veteran Kweli to learn the ropes. Lola the blue iguana plays hard-to-get when introduced to a potential mate, and anteater Velcro shows off her talents with a new tool.

programme.title: The Zoo: New Chick on the Block
programme.desc: A popular sea lion falls ill after ingesting a foreign object. The avian team devises a plan to increase the cock-of-the-rocks population. Endangered snakes are coupled for breeding, and Andean bear cubs meet their fans.

programme.title: The Zoo: Fawns Become Friends
programme.desc: Two sickly newborn fawns form an unbreakable bond while they are hand-reared by staff. Leopard Khazo gets a surprise that enhances her life, and tensions run high as the reptile staff attempts to collect blood from Cuban crocs.

programme.title: The Zoo: Porcupine Blind Date
programme.desc: The zoo opens an endangered turtle species facility, while Malayan tigers Suhanna and Rimba struggle to breed, because Rimba seems disinterested. Needles the porcupine gets a new mate, and the Guar herd eagerly await the arrival of new calves.

programme.desc: Kelly and Johnny Bonds investigate the twisted murder of a new grandmother strangled and set on fire in an abandoned school bus. Things get personal when the primary suspects turn out to be her next door neighbors.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Backwater Bloodshed
programme.desc: Kelly and Steve head into Louisiana to work with the Concordia Parish Sheriff's Office and investigate the 2016 homicide of a 26-year-old whose body was found on the banks of the bayou.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Golden Years Gone
programme.desc: Kelly and Abbey head to Colorado to help the Prowers County Sheriff's Office investigate the 1991 homicide of a beloved elderly couple who were brutally killed while working at their local VFW Hall.

programme.title: Movie: Ride Along
programme.desc: A detective brings his sister's boyfriend on a 24-hour patrol designed to scare the heck out of him, but things go much farther than planned when the night leads them to a major criminal.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Simpsons 138th Episode Spectacular
programme.desc: Troy McClure hosts this look back at The Simpsons' first eight seasons, featuring vintage clips, outtakes and highlights of the previous episodes.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Marge Be Not Proud
programme.desc: Bart is caught stealing a video game at a local store and desperately tries to hide this from his parents. When a family portrait is ruined as a result, Marge decides that it is her fault for mothering him too much.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Team Homer
programme.desc: Mr. Burns decides to join Homer's bowling team after becoming the sponsor. Bart's shirt leads to the implementation of uniforms at school, causing a loss of individuality and creativity.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Two Bad Neighbors
programme.desc: Homer's garage sale is upstaged by George Bush, who is moving in across the street. When Bart receives a spanking, Homer starts a prank war that escalates into a one-on-one confrontation.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Scenes From a Class Struggle in Springfield
programme.desc: While wearing an expensive suit found at an outlet mall, Marge meets a former schoolmate who invites her and the family to the country club. Marge soon becomes obsessed with trying to fit in with high society, while Homer takes up golf.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart the Fink
programme.desc: Bart inadvertently gets Krusty in trouble with the IRS by uncovering Krusty's tax-cheating ways. Soon after, Krusty is presumed dead when his plane crashes and a heartbroken Bart keeps thinking he sees Krusty in public.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer the Smithers
programme.desc: When Smithers takes a much-needed vacation, Homer is hired as a temporary replacement. After Homer loses his temper, Mr. Burns tackles some of the basic tasks himself and his newfound independence leaves Smithers jobless.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Day the Violence Died
programme.desc: Bart helps a homeless man prove he was the rightful creator of Itchy and Scratchy. But when the man is awarded damages in court, the Itchy and Scratchy studios have to close for good.

programme.title: The Simpsons: 22 Short Films About Springfield
programme.desc: While Bart and Milhouse wonder if anything interesting ever happens in Springfield, various residents find themselves in unusual situations.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Curse of the Flying Hellfish
programme.desc: Abe enlists Bart's help to stop Mr. Burns' plot to steal a legacy of art treasures from their platoon days during the Second World War.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: The Fresh Princ-ipal
programme.desc: Things get out of hand when Louise wins a contest to be Principal for a Day. Back at the restaurant, Teddy has a unique suggestion to help Bob when he suddenly finds himself unable to flip burgers.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Roamin' Bob-iday
programme.desc: The family forces workaholic Bob to take a much-needed day off, only for him to wind up working at a local sandwich shop. Meanwhile, Linda and the kids throw a last-minute baby shower at the restaurant for a female biker group.

programme.title: Family Guy: Big Trouble in Little Quahog
programme.desc: After Brian teases Stewie for being small, Stewie invents a shrinking machine that results in both of them shrinking to a microscopic size.

programme.title: Family Guy: Bri, Robot
programme.desc: Brian worries about the legacy he's leaving behind, so Stewie makes a robot duplicate as a living biography.

programme.title: Archer: Archer Vice: A Kiss While Dying
programme.desc: Archer, Pam and Lana travel to Miami to visit some old friends. It's a fondue party!

programme.title: Archer: Archer Vice: A Debt of Honor
programme.desc: Pam makes a deal that puts everyone in danger and Archer dons his slightly darker black suit to save the day.

programme.title: Mom: A Bear and a Bladder Infection

programme.title: Movie: Snatched
programme.desc: After her boyfriend dumps her on the eve of their exotic vacation, Emily convinces her cautious mother to go with her. Polar opposites, they are forced to get over their differences as mother and daughter when they are kidnapped by a dangerous group.

programme.title: Movie: Trainwreck
programme.desc: A commitment-phobic magazine writer is surprised to find her interest going beyond a one-night stand when she goes out with a nice-guy sports doctor on whom she's writing an article.

programme.title: Movie: Ride Along
programme.desc: A detective brings his sister's boyfriend on a 24-hour patrol designed to scare the heck out of him, but things go much farther than planned when the night leads them to a major criminal.

programme.title: Movie: The Other Woman
programme.desc: A woman thinks she's found the perfect guy, until she accidentally meets the wife he's been cheating on and the two women become fast friends. After learning about yet another girl he's lying to, the three women team up to exact sweet revenge.

programme.title: Movie: Evolution
programme.desc: After a meteor carrying aliens crashes on Earth, a team of misfits sets out to stop them.

programme.title: Movie: Back to School
programme.desc: An uneducated, self-made millionaire decides to join his son and go back to college.

programme.title: Movie: The 40-Year-Old Virgin
programme.desc: Andy Stitzer is 40 years old and has never had sex. His friends decide to make it their mission to rectify the situation, but they hit a roadblock when Andy falls in love with a mother of three who doesn't want sex to enter their relationship.

programme.title: Movie: The 40-Year-Old Virgin
programme.desc: Andy Stitzer is 40 years old and has never had sex. His friends decide to make it their mission to rectify the situation, but they hit a roadblock when Andy falls in love with a mother of three who doesn't want sex to enter their relationship.

programme.title: Movie: Evolution
programme.desc: After a meteor carrying aliens crashes on Earth, a team of misfits sets out to stop them.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation: The Quality of Life
programme.desc: Data risks Picard and Geordi's lives in order to protect 'living' machines.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation: Chain of Command
programme.desc: Picard is taken hostage by the Cardassians while on a dangerous secret mission.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation: Chain of Command
programme.desc: The Enterprise attempts to rescue a tortured Picard from the Cardassians.

programme.title: Great Bear Stakeout
programme.desc: Our cameras follow a first-time grizzly mum named Parsnip, and her cub Pushki.

programme.title: Great Bear Stakeout
programme.desc: Alaska's famous salmon run arrives, and Parsnip and Puski return to feed, but face fierce competition.

programme.title: Wild Singapore: Hidden World
programme.desc: In this first episode, we explore Singapore's hidden wilderness, overlooked areas of the island that are home to an astonishing variety of fascinating creatures.

programme.title: Wild Singapore: Urban Wild
programme.desc: Moving beyond the wild parts of Singapore, Sir David Attenborough takes us through a day in the life of the wildlife residing in Singapore's urban environments, from civets taking up residence in roof cavities to pythons hunting in drains.

programme.title: Wild Singapore: Islands
programme.desc: Head beneath the waves of Singapore's coast and islands to discover some of its aquatic animals, including the rare tiger tail seahorse, the powerful pistol shrimp and the dog-faced water snake.

programme.title: Wild Singapore: Forest Life
programme.desc: An exploration of Singapore's forests, which are home to some of the least known primates in the world, flying dragons, mating snakes, and many more.

programme.title: The Hunt: The Hardest Challenge
programme.desc: The contests between predators and prey are the most dramatic events in nature. The premiere episode reveals the extraordinary range of techniques predators use to catch their prey.

programme.title: The Hunt: In the Grip of Seasons: Arctic
programme.desc: This episode looks at the challenges of hunting in the Arctic, the most seasonal place on Earth. To a predator, seasonal change is a problem; it means that all the parameters of the hunt change too.

programme.title: The Hunt: Hide and Seek: Jungles
programme.desc: Follow tigers, harpy eagles, chimpanzees, army ants and other predators as they rise to the challenge of hunting within the forest. The prize for succeeding at nature's great game of hide-and-seek is one worth winning.

programme.title: The Hunt: Hunger at Sea: Oceans
programme.desc: This episode follows blue whales, sharks, sea lions and dolphins to reveal the strategies they use to hunt for prey. The ocean is an immense wilderness; predators face an endless search to find and catch food, yet the ocean is home to remarkable hunters.

programme.title: The Hunt: Nowhere to Hide: Plains
programme.desc: The open arenas of grassland and desert make up half of all land on our planet. In these exposed habitats, predators like cheetahs, bald eagles and lions can usually see their prey. But it works both ways: their prey can see them too.

programme.title: Drain the Oceans: Malaysia Airlines 370
programme.desc: Inside the longest, most expensive search in aviation history, for the missing flight MH370.

programme.title: Drain the Oceans: Mysteries of the China Seas
programme.desc: The most fiercely contested and mysterious waters on the planet are in the China seas.

programme.title: Drain the Ocean: Lost Worlds of the Mediterranean
programme.desc: When the Mediterranean is drained, the secrets of lost ancient civilizations come to light.

programme.title: Drain the Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: Nat Geo explores the Bermuda Triangle's ominous reputation by draining the water from it to see what exactly lies below the surface. With data from sonar surveys, see what the ocean floor beneath the Triangle looks like.

programme.title: Drain the Oceans: Gulf of Mexico
programme.desc: Draining the ocean reveals the Gulf of Mexico’s most deadly secrets.

programme.title: Drain the Oceans: Legends of Atlantis
programme.desc: Evidence of underwater cities explored.

programme.title: Drain the Oceans: Chicago
programme.desc: Chicago’s extraordinary past emerges from the waters of Lake Michigan.

programme.title: Inside North Korea: Then and Now
programme.desc: Lisa Ling goes undercover in North Korea for a rare glimpse of the secretive country.

programme.title: Inside North Korea: The Kim Dynasty
programme.desc: North Korea's may only be avoiding complete destruction due to the continued reign of the Kim family.

programme.title: Inside North Korea: The Cyber State
programme.desc: North Korea embraces cyber-crime for profit and disruption with a 6000 strong army of cyber criminals worldwide.

programme.title: North Korea From the Inside With Michael Palin
programme.desc: Michael and the crew captured the historic meeting between Kim John-Un and Moon Jae-In. Michael visited sites and locations rarely, if ever, explored in his journey across the country, spending time with citizens from all walks of life.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Jungle Werewolf
programme.desc: A strange beast is spotted in a remote Brazilian town. A cataclysmic blast sparks fears of nuclear disaster. When a child displays superhuman powers, some fear it's the devil's work.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Chasing Bigfoot
programme.desc: An eerie creature is recorded stalking Georgia's ancient forest, and some believe it's Bigfoot. Terrifying explosions rock the streets of Manhattan. Cameras record a mysterious object diving into a deadly volcano, leaving experts stumped.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Attack of the Fire Devil
programme.desc: A man is recorded surviving two lightning strikes in moments. Cameras spot strange lights in the sky in Norway, turning a remote area into a UFO hot spot. A bizarre glowing object is caught on tape at a museum, and some wonder if it's an alien artifact.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of the Monster Spider
programme.desc: A massive spider's web takes over a park, leading experts to investigate if this monstrous trap could capture a human. A tree spurts out thick red blood, and some believe it could be an undiscovered species of carnivorous plant.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Return of the Ice Monster
programme.desc: A giant creature in an armor of ice is spotted in the Alaskan wild, and some suspect it's a deadly mythical monster. A jet has a close encounter with an unknown object. Evidence of a deadly lightning strike invites paranormal explanations.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Ghost in the Abyss
programme.desc: A deep-ocean expedition discovers unnerving evidence of an alien-like monster stirring in the abyss. When an apocalyptic shockwave is caught on tape, investigators wonder if a meteor has hit a city. Something bizarre is happening in a Siberian ice river.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Secrets of the Himalaya Alien
programme.desc: When a bizarre, alien skeleton is found in an abandoned compound in the Himalayas, some speculate that it's the corpse of a newly-dead dinosaur, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate if it's evidence of a top-secret Jurassic Park.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Alien Armageddon Conspiracy
programme.desc: A terrifying tower of fire is caught on camera, causing eyewitnesses to fear an alien invasion. Using cutting-edge science, experts investigate the threat causing this nightmarish phenomenon, and if a cover-up is hiding the truth.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: When Bigfoot Attacks
programme.desc: When cameras record a strange creature in the wilderness perform an incredible feat of strength, some suspect it's hard proof of Bigfoot; using cutting-edge science, experts investigate if they've discovered the spawn of Sasquatch and Iron Man.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Nuclear Demon Mummy
programme.desc: When a strange, dried-out creature washes ashore downriver from a nuclear power plant, some experts suspect it's the mummified corpse of a mutant; using the latest science and tech, this incredible theory is put to the test.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Vampire Down Under
programme.desc: A strange creature on the site of one of the worst nuclear disasters ever sparks fears of a terrifying genetic mutation. New evidence suggests a legendary predator with a thirst for blood might have come back from the dead.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Skinwalker Awakens
programme.desc: Evidence of a man transforming into an animal is caught on camera on a Native American reservation in Utah, leading some experts ask if it's proof of a Skinwalker, a legendary evil creature that can shapeshift into a deadly beast.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Stargate in the Jungle
programme.desc: Something strange is caught on camera in a tunnel beneath the Colombian jungle, leading experts to wonder if it's a wormhole to far-off places in the cosmos. Using cutting-edge tech, they investigate if there's an interdimensional conspiracy at play.

programme.title: Web of Lies: With Friends Like These
programme.desc: A young girl has lewd photos of her taken at a party, with no memory of the night. Her world is turned upside down and the public shaming pushes her over the edge.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Tainted Love
programme.desc: Retiree Alex Strategos moves to Florida to be closer to his son, but loneliness consumes him. He turns to internet dating and finds 69 year-old Melissa, but is soon struck by a rush of unexplained illnesses.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Exposed
programme.desc: Three young girls meet a new friend online. Like other boys in the chat rooms, he's around their age, friendly, and flirtatious. Months later his demeanor shifts, trapping the girls in a vicious game from which they can't escape.

programme.title: See No Evil: Seeking Out Maple
programme.desc: In the early hours of September 28th, 2011, student Maple Batalia is found shot dead in the parking lot of Simon Fraser University.

programme.title: See No Evil: Seen at Susan's
programme.desc: On April 12th 2008, Susan Casey vanishes after a night out. The only clues left behind are suspicious drag marks outside her home. CCTV footage reveals three different suspects on the scene. The police must find out who is lying.

programme.title: See No Evil: All Eyes on Megan
programme.desc: When a teenager goes missing from her local Walmart, detectives struggle for leads. But then surveillance cameras reveal terrifying footage of a prowler kidnapping her, transforming this investigation into a desperate race to bring her home alive.

programme.title: See No Evil: Blue Blood
programme.desc: On April 3rd, 2017, Assistant Chief Deputy Clint Greenwood is shot dead at point blank range at the Harris County courthouse outside Houston, Texas. With no witnesses, detectives launch a man hunt. Can security cameras lead them to Clint's killer?

programme.title: See No Evil: Random Sighting
programme.desc: Tosha Lampkin is in Shreveport, Louisiana visiting family. After a late-night trip for food, Tosha disappears. Her burnt out rental car is discovered... along with Tosha's remains. CCTV cameras provide detectives with their only lead on her killers.

programme.title: See No Evil: No Good Deed
programme.desc: On September 28th 2014, Diane Cunningham is bludgeoned to death in her bedroom. The only clues are receipts from Walmart, a ferry crossing, and a casino. Security footage reveals a prime suspect with a motive, but not everything is quite as it seems.

programme.title: See No Evil: Eye in the Sky
programme.desc: When 27-year-old Christie Wilson disappears after a night at the local casino, surveillance cameras reveal her gambling with a mysterious man. Can this video footage unlock the secrets of what happened next and help bring her home alive?

programme.title: See No Evil: Gentle Giant
programme.desc: On August 25, 2015, 51-year-old care worker Torrance Cheeves is found stabbed to death in his San Antonio, Texas home. With no suspects and a trail of puzzling evidence, investigators turn to surveillance cameras in the surrounding area for answers.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: The Night Stalker Attacks
programme.desc: When Cindy Borton is found brutally stabbed to death in her home, authorities immediately suspect those closest to her. But a note left at the site of a local arson lights a trail that turns the investigation on its head.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Roses are Red, Murder is Too
programme.desc: When a town counsel member is found murdered in her home, residents of Berryville, Virginia are appalled. With the only evidence being the single bullet that took her life, the slaying begins to look more and more like a professional hit.

programme.title: My Family's Deadly Secret: Bloodland
programme.desc: Michael and Rebecca Hargon vanish from their Mississippi home along with their young son. When investigators discover Michael has recently come into an inheritance, they are forced to confront the idea that his recent good fortune may be a factor.

programme.title: My Family's Deadly Secret: Who Killed Cathy?
programme.desc: When 20-year-old student Cathy Torrez is discovered dead in the trunk of her own car, her family won't rest until her killer is bought to justice. After breakthroughs in forensic technology years later, the truth behind who killed Cathy is revealed.

programme.title: My Family's Deadly Secret: Murder at the House of God
programme.desc: In January 2014, Nathan and Krystal Maddox are gunned down just seconds after leaving a remote Texan church. The brutal double murder leaves a close-knit community traumatized and looking for answers.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Granny Gets a Gun
programme.desc: A woman disapproves of her granddaughter's new boyfriend and plots to eliminate him.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Death Benefits
programme.desc: These deadly women discovered that death isn't always full of sorrow but sometimes has 'benefits.'

programme.title: Deadly Women: Vow to Kill
programme.desc: Commitments’ out clause is 'til death do us part.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Twisted Desires
programme.desc: Every murder is a tragedy but some are plain barbaric.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Fatal Ties
programme.desc: These Deadly Women take the wedding vow 'till death do us part' seriously; they make sure their marriages are "Fatal Ties."

programme.title: Deadly Women: Dumped and Dangerous
programme.desc: When their love life goes sour these Deadly Women take lethal revenge. They are 'Dumped and Dangerous.'

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Dr. Deception
programme.desc: When Jean Claude Dominique is the victim of a hit-and-run, his wife Eliette rushes to his side. It's there she comes face-to-face with his OTHER wife. It's her first glimpse into his double life that leads to her fighting for her own.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Obsession Has Its Price
programme.desc: Bill Douglas is a respected doctor at Tufts University in Boston. But his focus isn't on science – it's on a bombshell prostitute he met in a red light district called the Combat Zone. Together, they lead double lives… leading to someone's murder.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: The Vatican
programme.desc: The Vatican is a secretive, watchful institution that protects its reputation and the members of its ranks with fierce, often reckless abandon. The secrets and scandals throughout its history are some of the darkest.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Kennedy Killings
programme.desc: Conspiracy theories surrounding the assassination of Robert Kennedy, the murder of TV presenter Jill Dando and the death of government weapons inspector Dr. David Kelly are examined.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Be a Ladies' Man
programme.desc: David Corbin is a career criminal. After a stint in prison, Corbin launches a crime wave, stealing cars and selling them for a profit. But when a jealous girlfriend rats him out, Corbin is caught and sent to prison where he pulls off a daring escape.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Take Down My Ex-Boyfriend
programme.desc: Donna Schatz went on the run after carrying out a violent vendetta on her ex-boyfriend.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Be the 'Green Baron'
programme.desc: Tony Darwin makes millions piloting marijuana into Florida. Even after getting caught, he continues works for a notorious smuggler until a deadly plane crash forces him to flee the country.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Death Certificate
programme.desc: After witnessing a murder, Anthony Ragno goes on the run. Building a new life trafficking pot in the Haitian islands, a coke addiction and close calls with local governments drive Ragno back to the US with a fake name.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Escape Through an Air Duct
programme.desc: After killing a man, ex-con Rondell Reed crashes his getaway car and is sent to prison. He and his cellmate escape by squeezing through an air duct. Once free, he steals and carjacks his way north to Ohio where another chase leads to another car crash.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Kennedy Killings
programme.desc: Conspiracy theories surrounding the assassination of Robert Kennedy, the murder of TV presenter Jill Dando and the death of government weapons inspector Dr. David Kelly are examined.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Tet Offensive
programme.desc: During the infamous Tet Offensive of 1968, an elite band of US Special Operations troops are called in to rescue dozens of helpless civilians trapped in the border town of Chau Doc, which has been captured by an overwhelming Viet Cong invasion force.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Search and Destroy
programme.desc: In a battle known as the Nine Days in May, the troops of the US 4th Infantry Division are on a search and destroy mission in Vietnam's Central Highlands when they run headlong into a massive force of North Vietnamese soldiers on the Cambodian border.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Road to Baghdad
programme.desc: See the shot by shot firefights in the 21 day bloody battle for Baghdad from the warrior's point of view.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Real Mary Magdalene

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Dark Truths of the Templars
programme.desc: Templar fact and fiction have become blurred by their depictions in book and on film. However, we present a very different picture that challenges head on the orthodox beliefs about an order that angered much of Europe, particularly France.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Inventions
programme.desc: From the mass production of life-saving Penicillin and pioneering Plastic Surgery, to the development of the Internet and GPS, this episode uses rare archive footage and expert interviews to identify and rank the most influential inventions of warfare.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Weapons
programme.desc: The story of warfare in the modern age, from the legendary Spitfire to the stealth bombers of Iraq.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Aircraft
programme.desc: Find out about aircraft important to conflicts in the 20th and 21st centuries.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Battles
programme.desc: With incredible archive from the heart of the action, and interviews with world-leading historians, this action-packed episode counts down the most decisive battles of warfare that have been caught on camera.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Vessels
programme.desc: This episode ranks the most iconic vessels of warfare of the last century. Featuring the German U-Boat, the Nimitz Aircraft Carriers, and the world's most successful battleship, these vessels have changed the face of warfare.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: In 1941, Hitler has thrown himself into a fight to the death against Stalin. Two decades earlier, in 1917, Joseph Jughashvili from Georgia is a member of Lenin's Bolshevik Party, who has just seized power in Russia. The country is torn by civil war.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Moving Up in the World
programme.desc: Cracks in the foundation put a dent in MJ's hot tub dreams, while Mike tries to keep the focus on structure as the second floor walls go up. MJ decides not to tarp the house before a heavy rain, dampening both Mike's mood and the wood beneath his feet.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Decisions, Decisions ...

programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly go on a mission to find a special balloon for Keia's birthday party. When the pugs' cousin, Cody, goes missing during a game of hide-and-seek, Bingo and Rolly must find him before his family comes to pick him up.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: No Bones About It/ Bob's Sock Debacle
programme.desc: When Bonnie’s dinosaur bone is lost, the pups team up with a roadrunner to find it. The pups set out to look for Bob's favorite golf socks before he participates in a tournament.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Chicken RoundUp/ Summer's Snow Cone Stop
programme.desc: After Animal is finished playing with the chicks in the backyard, he gets distracted and forgets to put them back in the coop. Summer opens her own Snow Cone Stop!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: One Unicorny Day!/ The Happy Horse Helpers!
programme.desc: When a horse gets a traffic cone stuck on her head and is sprayed with sparkly paint, the townsfolk think they've seen a real unicorn.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Donald's Fast Food 500/ Mini-Helpers
programme.desc: Mickey and his friends plan to surprise Donald with a waffle breakfast for his birthday. Minnie's nieces, Millie and Melody, visit the Happy Helpers office for the day.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bingo and Rolly's Playcare Picnic Party/ Judge Rolly
programme.desc: The Pugs throw Keia a picnic when she can't attend the Playcare's picnic in the park! Rolly gets carried away when he designates himself as judge to keep the peace at Playcare!

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Summer's Big Kerfloofle/ Frog Scouts
programme.desc: When Bunsen and Beaker bring a Floofle to the playroom, it bonds with Summer. Kermit, Robin and Carlos are so excited for their very first Frog Scouts outing, led by Mr. Manny.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bob's Blue Belt/ The Playcare Heist
programme.desc: Bob's blue belt doesn't arrive in time for his martial arts class photo, so Bingo and Rolly make it their mission to get him a belt. When Keia realizes she accidentally left her favorite stuffed animal at Playcare, she and the pugs set off to rescue it.

programme.title: Mira, Royal Detective: The Topsy Turvy Tiffin Mystery/ Mystery at the Invention Fair
programme.desc: When Mikku and Chikku accidentally mix up the tiffin delivery, Mira helps set things right. At the Jalpur Invention Fair, an important piece of Dhruv's invention goes missing.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Bouncy Bouncy Baby/ Like Cats and Dogs
programme.desc: Pip gets locked inside a crate with a baby kangaroo. Pip and Freddy must teach squabbling kitten and puppy siblings to share.

programme.title: Disney Junior Ready for Preschool: Everybody Wash Your Hands
programme.desc: Doc and the toys learn how to wash their hands.

programme.title: Bluey: Mum and Dads / Mount Mumandad / Asparagus
programme.desc: Rusty and Indy have a disagreement; Bluey and Bingo pretend Mum and Dad are a mountain; Dad teaches Bluey table manners.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The House That Bulworth Built/ Moon Rescue Mission
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly build a brand new home for Bulworth; The pugs rescue Spot from the moon.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Bark Bowl / When Hedgie Met Sallie
programme.desc: The pups get trained by a puppyball expert for the puppyball championship. Hedgie helps the pups catch the veggie bandit in Bob's vegetable patch.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Give 'Em the Boot / Tik Tok, Broken Clock
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly search for the perfect pair of cowboy boots so Bob can go line dancing during his Texas road trip. Then, when Bob discovers the clock tower in a small town he's visiting is broken, the pugs go on a mission to fix it.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Great Pug-scape/ Luck of the Pug-ish
programme.desc: After Hissy gets a 'time out' for the day, Bingo and Rolly try to break her out of her punishment. To change Bob's fortune, the pugs travel to Ireland to bring home some good luck.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Windy City/ Sham-pooch
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly go on a mission to the Windy City for Bob's kite! Keia is nervous about going to the groomer, so the pugs make it their mission to help her.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Night at the Nursery/ Seas the Day
programme.desc: A tenacious penguin and a kind hearted flamingo train to be delivery birds.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: You've Gotta Be Kitten Me / Whale, Hello There
programme.desc: On Pip and Freddy’s first day, they deliver a kitten who mistakes them as her parents. When there is a two-ton baby whale delivery, the fliers compete in a fly-off for the task.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: The Goofy Race! / Cuckoo for Cuckoo Clocks!
programme.desc: Goofy designs the first ever Goofy Race! When Cuckoo Loca's cuckoo clock is broken, Minnie and Daisy decide to get her a new one.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Goofasaur!/ Teahouse Helpers
programme.desc: A tour of Tokyo goes sideways when Goofy accidentally unleashes a robot dinosaur upon the city! Minnie takes her friends to experience a traditional Japanese tea ceremony.

programme.title: Bluey: The Sleepover / Hide and Seek / Camping
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo's cousin Muffin shows up for a sleepover; Bluey plays a game of hide and seek with Bingo; Bluey goes camping and meets Jean-Luc.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Dinner Thief on the Puppytown Express / O' Brother, Where ARF Thou?
programme.desc: Bob takes the pugs on a dinner train but all the food's gone missing; When ARF's batteries run out, the pugs and pals try to rescue their robo-brother.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: A Rose by Any Other Name/ Queen Bee
programme.desc: Simon's experiment of how plants respond to positive or negative feedback creates a monster, and it is growing. Brittany's fear of bees turns into admiration when she's shrunk down to their size and experiences life as a bee.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Un-send!/ The Orb
programme.desc: Simon accidentally sends an email venting about a professor and the boys must keep the teacher from reading it! Theodore has a hard time saying no and trouble ensues when Alvin needs Theodore to say yes.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Missing Miss Smith/ Monster Madness
programme.desc: When Alvin finally pushes Miss Smith too far, she quits and her replacement is a nightmare. Alvin and Simon tease The Chipettes about being scared by a movie.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Alvin's Wild Weekend/ For Whom the Bell Tolls
programme.desc: Alvin begs Dave to spend a weekend alone with him. A hypnotist accidentally turns Simon into a bumbling fool before an academic contest.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Wishy Washy/ Poof's Playdate
programme.desc: Timmy's wish for a magical car wash that rejuvenated anything has unexpected consequences. Timmy wishes for fairy babies to play with poof.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Big Wanda/ Moving Day
programme.desc: Timmy wishes his Mom could sell a house to anyone; Wanda is called in to run the business.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents

programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick get carried away when they fill in for Mermaidman and Barnacleboy. Squidward poses as the teacher at a prestigious music school. But SpongeBob and Patrick show up and nearly blow his cover.

programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick build a small clubhouse in a tree and get inside. When Squid comes by, they tell him he can't join the club because he wouldn't fit in. Upset, Squid insists on joining and climbs the tree and gets inside.

programme.desc: Plankton hires Patrick to create advertising slogans for the Chum Bucket. SpongeBob helps Plankton find the perfect anniversary gift for Karen.

programme.desc: SpongeBob wants his friends and family to help celebrate King Neptune's birthday.

programme.desc: Raph's bonding with little Chompy is interrupted by the invasion of Tokka, who has come to Earth searching for him.

programme.desc: A mysterious new enemy with superhuman speed is on the hunt for Tiger Claw, and will take out whoever stands in her way.

programme.desc: The Turtle team hunts for their Sensei, but soon realize they are being hunted as well.

programme.desc: Leonardo, Donatello, Raphael, Michelangelo, and Splinter work to keep the city safe.

programme.title: The People's Court
